idea_spark.idea: 将基础模型范式应用于微分方程轨迹预测，通过预训练学习物理系统的通用动态表示
idea_spark.risk: 预训练数据规模和质量对模型泛化能力影响显著，领域微调数据需覆盖目标系统关键动态
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合物理方程先验与数据驱动学习，构建可解释、可迁移的动态系统预测模型

en.tldr: This paper proposes the LASS-ODE-Power framework that learns transferable representations through large-scale pretraining on DAE/ODE trajectories, enabling zero-shot prediction of power-system dynamic trajectories without data sharing and with fast inference.
en.motivation: As power systems transition toward renewable-rich and inverter-dominated operations, accurate time-domain dynamic analysis becomes critical for tasks like transient stability assessment and dynamic security analysis. Existing learning-based approaches lack generalization across operating conditions and physical parameters, while facing challenges of unknown parameters, data privacy constraints, and fast online inference needs.
en.method: Proposes the LASS-ODE-Power learning framework: 1) large-scale pretraining on over 40GB of DAE/ODE trajectories to learn transferable representations; 2) supports zero-shot trajectory prediction from short measurement prefixes across electromechanical and inverter-driven systems; 3) incorporates parallel and linearized computation for fast inference; 4) develops specialized fine-tuning strategy using approximately 1GB of heterogeneous power-system dynamic data.
en.result: Extensive experiments across diverse power-system simulation scenarios demonstrate that LASS-ODE-Power consistently outperforms existing learning-based models in trajectory prediction accuracy while maintaining efficient inference.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general-purpose, transferable, and privacy-preserving trajectory prediction framework for power-system dynamic analysis, supporting zero-shot deployment and fast online applications.

idea_spark.idea: Apply foundation model paradigm to differential equation trajectory prediction, learning universal dynamic representations of physical systems through pretraining
idea_spark.risk: Pretraining data scale and quality significantly impact model generalization; domain fine-tuning data must cover key dynamics of target systems
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine physical equation priors with data-driven learning to build interpretable, transferable dynamic system prediction models

papers.title: A criterion for proving entropy chaos on path space
papers.summary: A criterion for proving a strong form of propagation of chaos on the path space, known as entropy chaos, for a general interacting diffusion system is proposed. Our analysis focuses on the class of conservative diffusions introduced by Carlen, which are characterized by infinitesimal characteristic pairs, that is, a time-marginal probability density and a current velocity field. A key property of this broad class is that the processes remain diffusions under time-reversal. We prove that, given a suitable bound on the relative entropy (with respect to the Wiener measure) and the weak convergence of both drifts and fixed-time marginal densities, strong entropy chaos at the process level is achieved in the infinite particle limit, provided the limit drift satisfies a specific regularity condition. This stochastic framework encompasses various singular interacting particle systems and their related asymptotic scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种在路径空间上证明熵混沌的判据，适用于一般相互作用扩散系统。
ai.motivation: 研究相互作用粒子系统在无限粒子极限下的强传播混沌（熵混沌）现象，需要一种普适的证明框架。
ai.method: 聚焦于Carlen引入的保守扩散类，利用其特征对（时间边缘概率密度和当前速度场）和时间可逆性。通过相对熵的界、漂移项和固定时间边缘密度的弱收敛，结合极限漂移的特定正则性条件，证明过程水平的强熵混沌。
ai.result: 在给定条件下，证明了无限粒子极限下过程水平的强熵混沌成立。该随机框架涵盖多种奇异相互作用粒子系统及其渐近场景。
ai.help_to_user: 为证明路径空间上的熵混沌提供了一个通用判据，适用于广泛的相互作用扩散模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将熵混沌判据应用于其他随机动力系统（如跳跃过程、带噪声的偏微分方程）的传播混沌分析。
idea_spark.risk: 极限漂移的正则性条件可能在某些奇异模型中难以验证；框架对模型结构（保守扩散类）有特定依赖。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用信息论工具（相对熵）量化高维随机过程的混沌程度，可能启发复杂系统同步或退相关现象的新度量。

en.tldr: A criterion for proving entropy chaos on path space is proposed for general interacting diffusion systems.
en.motivation: A general proof framework is needed for the strong propagation of chaos (entropy chaos) phenomenon in interacting particle systems in the infinite particle limit.
en.method: Focuses on the class of conservative diffusions introduced by Carlen, characterized by infinitesimal characteristic pairs and time-reversal invariance. Proves strong entropy chaos at the process level by bounding relative entropy, assuming weak convergence of drifts and fixed-time marginal densities, plus a specific regularity condition on the limit drift.
en.result: Strong entropy chaos at the process level is achieved in the infinite particle limit under the given conditions. The stochastic framework encompasses various singular interacting particle systems and their asymptotic scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general criterion for proving entropy chaos on path space, applicable to a wide range of interacting diffusion models.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the entropy chaos criterion to propagation of chaos analysis in other stochastic dynamical systems (e.g., jump processes, noisy PDEs).
idea_spark.risk: The regularity condition on the limit drift may be difficult to verify in some singular models; the framework relies on the specific structure of conservative diffusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using information-theoretic tools (relative entropy) to quantify chaos in high-dimensional stochastic processes could inspire new measures for synchronization or decorrelation in complex systems.

papers.title: Structural interpretability in SVMs with truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels
papers.summary: We study post-training interpretability for Support Vector Machines (SVMs) built from truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels. Since the associated reproducing kernel Hilbert space is finite-dimensional and admits an explicit tensor-product orthonormal basis, the fitted decision function can be expanded exactly in intrinsic RKHS coordinates. This leads to Orthogonal Representation Contribution Analysis (ORCA), a diagnostic framework based on normalized Orthogonal Kernel Contribution (OKC) indices. These indices quantify how the squared RKHS norm of the classifier is distributed across interaction orders, total polynomial degrees, marginal coordinate effects, and pairwise contributions. The methodology is fully post-training and requires neither surrogate models nor retraining. We illustrate its diagnostic value on a synthetic double-spiral problem and on a real five-dimensional echocardiogram dataset. The results show that the proposed indices reveal structural aspects of model complexity that are not captured by predictive accuracy alone.

ai.tldr: 提出ORCA框架，通过正交核贡献指数分析基于截断正交多项式核的SVM模型结构复杂度，无需重新训练或代理模型。
ai.motivation: 传统预测精度无法揭示SVM模型内部结构复杂度，需要一种后训练解释性方法分析核函数贡献分布。
ai.method: 利用有限维再生核希尔伯特空间的显式张量积正交基，将分类器决策函数展开为内在坐标，计算正交核贡献指数量化平方范数在交互阶数、多项式次数等维度的分布。
ai.result: 在合成双螺旋问题和真实超声心动图数据集上验证，指数能揭示模型结构特征，补充预测精度信息。
ai.help_to_user: 提供无需重新训练的SVM结构诊断工具，帮助理解模型决策依赖的特征交互模式。

idea_spark.idea: 将模型复杂度分解为可解释的几何分量，建立核函数参数与模型行为的结构化映射。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定核函数类型；高维数据可能产生指数组合爆炸。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将函数分析工具与模型诊断结合，为黑箱模型提供代数几何视角的解释性框架。

zh.tldr: 提出ORCA框架，通过正交核贡献指数分析基于截断正交多项式核的SVM模型结构复杂度，无需重新训练或代理模型。
zh.motivation: 传统预测精度无法揭示SVM模型内部结构复杂度，需要一种后训练解释性方法分析核函数贡献分布。

idea_spark.idea: 将模型复杂度分解为可解释的几何分量，建立核函数参数与模型行为的结构化映射。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定核函数类型；高维数据可能产生指数组合爆炸。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将函数分析工具与模型诊断结合，为黑箱模型提供代数几何视角的解释性框架。

en.tldr: Proposes ORCA framework using Orthogonal Kernel Contribution indices to analyze structural complexity of SVMs with truncated orthogonal polynomial kernels, without retraining or surrogate models.
en.motivation: Predictive accuracy alone cannot reveal internal structural complexity of SVM models, requiring post-training interpretability methods to analyze kernel contribution distributions.
en.method: Utilizes explicit tensor-product orthonormal basis of finite-dimensional RKHS to expand classifier decision function in intrinsic coordinates, computing OKC indices quantifying squared norm distribution across interaction orders, polynomial degrees, and marginal effects.
en.result: Validated on synthetic double-spiral problem and real echocardiogram dataset, indices reveal structural model aspects not captured by predictive accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides structural diagnostic tool for SVMs without retraining, helping understand feature interaction patterns underlying model decisions.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose model complexity into interpretable geometric components, establishing structured mapping between kernel parameters and model behavior.
idea_spark.risk: Dependent on specific kernel types; high-dimensional data may cause combinatorial explosion of indices.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining functional analysis tools with model diagnostics, providing algebraic-geometric interpretability framework for black-box models.

papers.title: AdaSplash-2: Faster Differentiable Sparse Attention
papers.summary: Sparse attention has been proposed as a way to alleviate the quadratic cost of transformers, a central bottleneck in long-context training. A promising line of work is $α$-entmax attention, a differentiable sparse alternative to softmax that enables input-dependent sparsity yet has lagged behind softmax due to the computational overhead necessary to compute the normalizer $τ$. In this paper, we introduce AdaSplash-2, which addresses this limitation through a novel histogram-based initialization that reduces the number of iterations needed to compute $τ$ to typically 1--2. The key idea is to compute a coarse histogram of attention scores on the fly and store it in on-chip SRAM, yielding a more accurate initialization that enables fast forward and backward computation. Combined with a sparsity-aware GPU implementation that skips zero blocks with low overhead, AdaSplash-2 matches or improves per-step training time relative to FlashAttention-2 when block sparsity is moderate-to-high (e.g., $>$60\%), which often occurs at long-context lengths. On downstream tasks, models trained with our efficient $α$-entmax attention match softmax baselines at short-context lengths and achieve substantial gains in long-context settings.

ai.tldr: AdaSplash-2 是一种更快的可微分稀疏注意力机制，通过直方图初始化减少计算开销，在长上下文训练中匹配或超越 FlashAttention-2 的速度。
ai.motivation: 传统 softmax 注意力在长上下文训练中存在二次方计算成本问题，而现有的可微分稀疏注意力（如 α-entmax）因计算归一化因子 τ 的迭代开销大而未能广泛应用。
ai.method: 提出一种新颖的直方图初始化方法，在芯片 SRAM 中动态计算并存储注意力分数的粗略直方图，从而将计算 τ 所需的迭代次数减少到 1-2 次，并结合感知稀疏度的 GPU 实现跳过零值块。
ai.result: 在块稀疏度中等至高（例如 >60%）时，AdaSplash-2 匹配或改进了相对于 FlashAttention-2 的每步训练时间；在长上下文设置中，使用高效 α-entmax 注意力训练的模型相比 softmax 基线获得显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要高效处理长序列的 Transformer 模型提供了可微分稀疏注意力的实用加速方案，尤其适用于长文档、基因组学等长上下文场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用硬件特性（如 SRAM）存储中间统计量（直方图）来预热迭代求解过程，减少收敛所需迭代次数。
idea_spark.risk: 直方图构建本身引入额外开销，在极短序列或极低稀疏度下可能无法体现优势；方法依赖于特定的硬件内存层次结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将统计近似（直方图）与精确迭代计算结合，在保持数学性质的同时大幅降低计算成本，为其他迭代算法设计提供了思路。

zh.tldr: AdaSplash-2 是一种更快的可微分稀疏注意力机制，通过直方图初始化减少计算开销，在长上下文训练中匹配或超越 FlashAttention-2 的速度。
zh.motivation: 传统 softmax 注意力在长上下文训练中存在二次方计算成本问题，而现有的可微分稀疏注意力（如 α-entmax）因计算归一化因子 τ 的迭代开销大而未能广泛应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用硬件特性（如 SRAM）存储中间统计量（直方图）来预热迭代求解过程，减少收敛所需迭代次数。
idea_spark.risk: 直方图构建本身引入额外开销，在极短序列或极低稀疏度下可能无法体现优势；方法依赖于特定的硬件内存层次结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将统计近似（直方图）与精确迭代计算结合，在保持数学性质的同时大幅降低计算成本，为其他迭代算法设计提供了思路。

en.tldr: AdaSplash-2 is a faster differentiable sparse attention mechanism that reduces computational overhead via histogram-based initialization, matching or surpassing FlashAttention-2 speed in long-context training.
en.motivation: The quadratic computational cost of standard softmax attention is a central bottleneck in long-context training, while existing differentiable sparse attention (e.g., α-entmax) has been hindered by the iterative overhead of computing the normalizer τ.
en.method: Introduces a novel histogram-based initialization method that computes a coarse histogram of attention scores on-the-fly stored in on-chip SRAM, reducing the iterations needed to compute τ to typically 1–2, combined with a sparsity-aware GPU implementation that skips zero blocks.
en.result: AdaSplash-2 matches or improves per-step training time relative to FlashAttention-2 when block sparsity is moderate-to-high (e.g., >60%); models trained with efficient α-entmax attention achieve substantial gains over softmax baselines in long-context settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical acceleration scheme for differentiable sparse attention in Transformer models that require efficient long-sequence processing, particularly beneficial for long-context scenarios like long documents or genomics.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage hardware features (e.g., SRAM) to store intermediate statistics (histogram) for warming up iterative solvers, reducing the number of iterations needed for convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Histogram construction introduces overhead; advantages may diminish for very short sequences or very low sparsity; the method relies on specific hardware memory hierarchy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining statistical approximation (histogram) with precise iterative computation maintains mathematical properties while drastically cutting cost, offering a design pattern for other iterative algorithms.

papers.title: Unsupervised feature selection using Bayesian Tucker decomposition
papers.summary: In this paper, we proposed Bayesian Tucker decomposition (BTuD) in which residual is supposed to obey Gaussian distribution analogous to linear regression. Although we have proposed an algorithm to perform the proposed BTuD, the conventional higher-order orthogonal iteration can generate Tucker decomposition consistent with the present implementation. Using the proposed BTuD, we can perform unsupervised feature selection successfully applied to various synthetic datasets, global coupled maps with randomized coupling strength, and gene expression profiles. Thus we can conclude that our newly proposed unsupervised feature selection method is promising. In addition to this, BTuD based unsupervised FE is expected to coincide with TD based unsupervised FE that were previously proposed and successfully applied to a wide range of problems.

ai.tldr: 提出贝叶斯Tucker分解（BTuD）方法，通过假设残差服从高斯分布实现无监督特征选择，并在合成数据、基因表达谱等数据集上验证有效性。
ai.motivation: 传统Tucker分解缺乏概率框架，难以进行不确定性量化。BTuD通过贝叶斯建模为无监督特征选择提供统计基础。
ai.method: 建立类似线性回归的高斯残差模型，采用高阶正交迭代算法实现贝叶斯Tucker分解，并应用于特征选择。
ai.result: 在合成数据集、随机耦合强度的全局耦合映射和基因表达谱数据上成功实现无监督特征选择，证明方法有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维数据降维和特征选择提供概率化工具，特别适用于生物信息学等需要可解释特征的数据分析场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将概率建模与传统张量分解结合，为特征选择提供统计显著性评估。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯假设可能不适用于非正态分布数据，计算复杂度可能限制大规模应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索变分推断加速计算，或结合领域知识设计结构化先验分布。

zh.tldr: 提出贝叶斯Tucker分解（BTuD）方法，通过假设残差服从高斯分布实现无监督特征选择，并在合成数据、基因表达谱等数据集上验证有效性。

idea_spark.risk: 高斯假设可能不适用于非正态分布数据，计算复杂度可能限制大规模应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索变分推断加速计算，或结合领域知识设计结构化先验分布。

en.tldr: Proposes Bayesian Tucker decomposition (BTuD) with Gaussian residual assumption for unsupervised feature selection, validated on synthetic datasets, gene expression profiles, and coupled maps.
en.motivation: Traditional Tucker decomposition lacks probabilistic framework for uncertainty quantification. BTuD provides statistical foundation for unsupervised feature selection through Bayesian modeling.
en.method: Establishes Gaussian residual model analogous to linear regression, implements Bayesian Tucker decomposition using higher-order orthogonal iteration, and applies it to feature selection.
en.result: Successfully performs unsupervised feature selection on synthetic datasets, global coupled maps with randomized coupling strength, and gene expression profiles, demonstrating method effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides probabilistic tool for dimensionality reduction and feature selection in high-dimensional data, particularly useful for bioinformatics and other interpretable-feature scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combine probabilistic modeling with traditional tensor decomposition to provide statistical significance assessment for feature selection.
idea_spark.risk: Gaussian assumption may not suit non-normal data; computational complexity may limit large-scale applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore variational inference for faster computation or incorporate domain knowledge through structured prior design.

papers.title: Pool model: a mass preserving multi particle aggregation process
papers.summary: We present and study the Pool model in $\mathbb{R}^2$, a rotationally symmetric analogue of Multi-Particle Diffusion-Limited Aggregation (MDLA), in which particles ("droplets") perform continuous-time random walks and are absorbed upon entering a circular pool initially centered at the origin. Each absorbed particle increases the pool's mass, and the pool expands so that its area grows accordingly, yielding a natural mass-preserving dynamics. A central tool which is of independent interest is a version of Kurtz's theorem for this model, depicting the field of particles conditioned on the growth of the pool as an independent non-homogeneous Poisson point process.

ai.tldr: 提出并研究二维空间中的Pool模型，这是一种旋转对称的多粒子扩散限制聚集（MDLA）类比，其中粒子随机游走并被圆形池吸收，池的质量和面积随吸收粒子同步增长，保持质量守恒。
ai.motivation: 为多粒子扩散限制聚集过程提供一个质量守恒的旋转对称类比，研究粒子随机游走被动态扩张的池吸收的集体行为。
ai.method: 定义粒子连续时间随机游走，被原点初始圆形池吸收；每个被吸收粒子增加池质量，池随之扩张以保持面积与质量成比例；核心工具是适用于该模型的Kurtz定理变体，将条件粒子场描述为独立非齐次泊松点过程。
ai.result: 建立了Pool模型的数学框架，证明了描述条件粒子场的Kurtz定理版本，为旋转对称质量守恒聚集过程提供了分析工具。

en.tldr: We introduce and study the Pool model in 2D, a rotationally symmetric analogue of Multi-Particle Diffusion-Limited Aggregation (MDLA), where particles perform continuous-time random walks and are absorbed by a circular pool that expands to preserve mass as particles are added.
en.motivation: To provide a mass-preserving rotationally symmetric analogue for multi-particle diffusion-limited aggregation processes, studying collective behavior where particles are absorbed by a dynamically expanding pool.
en.method: Define particles performing continuous-time random walks absorbed upon entering a circular pool initially centered at origin; each absorbed particle increases pool mass, with pool expanding so area grows proportionally; central tool is a version of Kurtz's theorem for this model, depicting the conditioned particle field as an independent non-homogeneous Poisson point process.
en.result: Established mathematical framework for Pool model, proved version of Kurtz's theorem describing conditioned particle field, providing analytical tools for rotationally symmetric mass-preserving aggregation processes.
en.help_to_user: Provides new rotationally symmetric model and mathematical tools for studying mass-preserving stochastic aggregation processes, applicable to collective phenomena in mathematical and statistical physics.

idea_spark.idea: Apply mass-preserving expansion to other stochastic growth models (e.g., DLA, Eden models), or study dynamics with non-circular deformed pools
idea_spark.risk: Higher-dimensional generalizations may involve complex geometric constraints; real physical systems may introduce non-ideal interactions
idea_spark.inspiration: Could model colloidal aggregation, crystal growth, biofilm expansion, or other physical/biological processes with mass conservation features

papers.title: Low-Cost System for Automatic Recognition of Driving Pattern in Assessing Interurban Mobility using Geo-Information
papers.summary: Mobility in urban and interurban areas, mainly by cars, is a day-to-day activity of many people. However, some of its main drawbacks are traffic jams and accidents. Newly made vehicles have pre-installed driving evaluation systems, which can prevent accidents. However, most cars on our roads do not have driver assessment systems. In this paper, we propose an approach for recognising driving styles and enabling drivers to reach safer and more efficient driving. The system consists of two physical sensors connected to a device node with a display and a speaker. An artificial neural network (ANN) is included in the node, which analyses the data from the sensors, and then recognises the driving style. When an abnormal driving pattern is detected, the speaker will play a warning message. The prototype was assembled and tested using an interurban road, in particular on a conventional road with three driving styles. The gathered data were used to train and validate the ANN. Results, in terms of accuracy, indicate that better accuracy is obtained when the velocity, position (latitude and longitude), time, and turning speed for the 3-axis are used, offering an average accuracy of 83%. If the classification is performed considering just two driving styles, normal and aggressive, then the accuracy reaches 92%. When the geo-information and time data are included, the main novelty of this paper, the classification accuracy is improved by 13%.

ai.tldr: 提出一种低成本系统，利用地理信息和传感器数据，通过人工神经网络自动识别城际驾驶模式，并在检测到异常驾驶时发出警告。
ai.motivation: 大多数现有车辆没有驾驶评估系统，而交通拥堵和事故是日常驾驶的主要问题。
ai.method: 系统由两个物理传感器连接到带显示屏和扬声器的设备节点组成，节点内置人工神经网络分析传感器数据以识别驾驶风格。
ai.result: 使用速度、位置、时间和三轴转向速度数据时平均准确率达83%；区分正常和攻击性驾驶时准确率达92%；加入地理信息和时间数据后分类准确率提升13%。
ai.help_to_user: 为没有预装驾驶评估系统的车辆提供低成本、实时的驾驶行为监控与安全预警方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将地理信息（经纬度）与时间序列传感器数据结合，作为驾驶风格分类的上下文特征。
idea_spark.risk: 系统依赖于低成本传感器的精度和可靠性，在复杂路况或恶劣天气下性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可扩展至其他移动行为分析场景，如骑行安全评估或物流车辆驾驶效率监控。

en.tldr: Proposes a low-cost system for automatic driving pattern recognition in interurban mobility assessment using geo-information and sensor data through an artificial neural network, with warnings for abnormal driving.
en.motivation: Most existing vehicles lack driver assessment systems, while traffic jams and accidents are major drawbacks of daily driving.
en.method: The system consists of two physical sensors connected to a device node with a display and speaker, containing an ANN that analyzes sensor data to recognize driving styles.
en.result: Average accuracy of 83% when using velocity, position, time, and 3-axis turning speed; 92% accuracy for normal vs. aggressive driving classification; inclusion of geo-information and time data improves classification accuracy by 13%.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost, real-time driving behavior monitoring and safety warning solution for vehicles without pre-installed assessment systems.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating geo-information (latitude/longitude) with time-series sensor data as contextual features for driving style classification.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under complex road conditions or adverse weather due to reliance on low-cost sensor accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extendable to other mobility behavior analysis scenarios, such as cycling safety assessment or logistics vehicle driving efficiency monitoring.

papers.title: Propagation dynamics for nonlocal dispersal predator-prey systems in shifting habitats: A Hamilton-Jacobi approach
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with the spreading speeds of nonlocal dispersal predator-prey systems in shifting habitats under general initial conditions. By employing geometric optics techniques and theory of viscosity solutions, we reformulate the problem into the study of Hamilton-Jacobi equations. Through a detailed analysis of the structure of viscosity solutions, we provide a complete classification of explicit formulas for the spreading speed of the prey population, especially in cases where it invades the habitat more rapidly than predators, yielding two fundamentally distinct ``nonlocal determinacy'' results derived by different mechanisms. We also obtain an upper bound for spreading speed of the predators, incorporating the decay rate of the initial data and the speed of shifting habitats. These findings demonstrate that there are complex connections among spreading speeds, habitat shifting speed and initial conditions, and emphasize the significance of nonlocal dispersal in determining the propagation dynamics of predator-prey systems.

ai.tldr: 本文采用 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程和粘性解理论，研究了非局部扩散捕食-被捕食系统在移动栖息地中的传播速度，给出了被捕食者种群传播速度的显式公式分类和捕食者传播速度的上界。
ai.motivation: 研究非局部扩散、栖息地移动和初始条件如何共同影响捕食-被捕食系统的传播动力学。
ai.method: 运用几何光学技术和粘性解理论，将问题转化为 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程的研究，并详细分析粘性解的结构。
ai.result: 完整分类了被捕食者种群传播速度的显式公式，揭示了两种由不同机制产生的“非局部确定性”结果；获得了包含初始数据衰减率和栖息地移动速度的捕食者传播速度上界。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解非局部扩散、环境变化和初始条件在生态种群传播中的复杂相互作用提供了严格的数学框架和定量结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何光学和粘性解理论应用于非局部扩散的生态模型，以解析传播速度。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设（如特定的非局部核函数、栖息地移动形式）可能限制结果的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展到其他具有非局部相互作用和非均匀环境的反应扩散系统或传染病模型。

en.tldr: This paper employs Hamilton-Jacobi equations and viscosity solution theory to study the spreading speeds of nonlocal dispersal predator-prey systems in shifting habitats, providing a complete classification of explicit formulas for the prey's spreading speed and an upper bound for the predator's speed.
en.motivation: To investigate how nonlocal dispersal, habitat shifting, and initial conditions jointly influence the propagation dynamics of predator-prey systems.
en.method: Using geometric optics techniques and viscosity solution theory to reformulate the problem into the study of Hamilton-Jacobi equations, with a detailed analysis of the structure of viscosity solutions.
en.result: A complete classification of explicit formulas for the spreading speed of the prey population, revealing two fundamentally distinct 'nonlocal determinacy' results derived by different mechanisms; an upper bound for the predator's spreading speed incorporating the decay rate of initial data and habitat shifting speed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and quantitative results for understanding the complex interplay among nonlocal dispersal, environmental change, and initial conditions in ecological population spread.

idea_spark.idea: Applying geometric optics and viscosity solution theory to ecological models with nonlocal dispersal to analytically derive spreading speeds.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions (e.g., specific nonlocal kernels, forms of habitat shift) may limit the generality of the results.
idea_spark.inspiration: The methodology could be extended to other reaction-diffusion systems or epidemic models with nonlocal interactions and heterogeneous environments.

papers.title: Towards Optimal Passive Feedback Control of LTI Systems under LQR Performance
papers.summary: We study state-feedback design for continuous-time LTI systems with a control input and an external input-output pair. Our objective is to determine feedback gains that render the closed-loop system (strictly) passive with respect to the external port while minimizing the standard LQR cost in the disturbance-free case. The resulting constrained optimization problem is intractable due to bilinear matrix inequalities. We analyze the set of passivating gains, showing it is unbounded, possibly nonconvex, path-connected, and contractible. We propose an indirect approach, in which the set of passivating feedback gains is inner-approximated by a compact, convex polytope. A projected gradient flow is employed to compute a gain within this polytope that minimizes the LQR cost. Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness of the method.

ai.tldr: 研究线性时不变系统在LQR性能指标下的最优无源反馈控制设计问题，通过凸多面体近似和投影梯度流求解。
ai.motivation: 在保证闭环系统对外部端口严格无源性的同时，最小化无扰动情况下的标准LQR成本，这是一个受双线性矩阵不等式约束的难解优化问题。
ai.method: 分析无源化增益集合的性质，用紧致凸多面体内近似该集合，并采用投影梯度流在该多面体内寻找最小化LQR成本的增益。
ai.result: 数值算例表明该方法有效，能够处理无源化增益集合可能非凸、无界但路径连通且可收缩的特性。
ai.help_to_user: 为控制工程师提供了一种在无源性约束下设计LQR最优反馈增益的计算框架，适用于需要保证系统无源性的安全关键应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将无源性约束下的LQR设计问题转化为在凸近似集上的优化，规避了直接处理双线性矩阵不等式的困难。
idea_spark.risk: 内近似可能过于保守，导致解集丢失部分性能更优的增益；投影梯度流可能收敛到局部最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对具有无界、非凸但拓扑性质良好的约束集合，采用几何分析与凸近似结合的优化思路。

zh.tldr: 研究线性时不变系统在LQR性能指标下的最优无源反馈控制设计问题，通过凸多面体近似和投影梯度流求解。

en.tldr: Studies optimal passive feedback control design for LTI systems under LQR performance, solved via convex polytope approximation and projected gradient flow.
en.motivation: To determine feedback gains that render the closed-loop system strictly passive while minimizing the standard LQR cost in the disturbance-free case, a constrained optimization problem intractable due to bilinear matrix inequalities.
en.method: Analyzes properties of the set of passivating gains, inner-approximates it by a compact convex polytope, and employs a projected gradient flow to compute a gain within this polytope minimizing the LQR cost.
en.result: Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness of the method in handling the possibly nonconvex, unbounded yet path-connected and contractible set of passivating gains.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computational framework for control engineers to design LQR-optimal feedback gains under passivity constraints, applicable to safety-critical systems requiring guaranteed passivity.

idea_spark.idea: Transforms the LQR design under passivity constraints into optimization over a convex approximation, circumventing direct handling of bilinear matrix inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: Inner approximation may be conservative, potentially excluding higher-performance gains; projected gradient flow may converge to local optima.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining geometric analysis with convex approximation for optimization over constraint sets that are unbounded, nonconvex but possess favorable topological properties.

papers.title: Local boundedness for solutions to degenerate parabolic double phase problems
papers.summary: In this paper, we investigate the local boundedness of weak solutions to degenerate parabolic double phase equation of type $$ u_t-\textrm{div}(|Du|^{p-2}Du+a(x,t)|Du|^{q-2}Du)=0\quad \text{in } Ω_T := Ω\times (0,T), $$ where $0\leq a(\cdot)\in L^\infty(Ω_T)$. To this end, we derive the Caccioppoli inequality and a parabolic embedding theorem, which are then utilized in an iteration method.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了退化抛物双相方程弱解的局部有界性，通过建立Caccioppoli不等式和抛物嵌入定理，并应用迭代方法证明。
ai.motivation: 双相方程在非均匀介质建模中具有广泛应用，其退化抛物形式的解正则性尚未完全明确，局部有界性是基本正则性问题的关键一步。
ai.method: 推导适用于双相算子的Caccioppoli不等式，建立抛物嵌入定理，结合迭代技术进行正则性估计。
ai.result: 证明了在系数a(x,t)非负有界条件下，退化抛物双相方程弱解的局部有界性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了处理双相算子退化抛物问题的正则性分析框架，迭代方法可推广至类似非线性方程。

idea_spark.idea: 将双相算子的各向异性增长条件转化为可迭代的能量估计
idea_spark.risk: 系数a(x,t)的振荡性可能影响正则性结论
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可尝试扩展至具变指数或非标准增长条件的抛物方程

en.tldr: This paper investigates the local boundedness of weak solutions to degenerate parabolic double phase equations, proving it via Caccioppoli inequality, parabolic embedding theorem, and an iteration method.
en.motivation: Double phase equations model heterogeneous materials; regularity of their degenerate parabolic versions is not fully understood, with local boundedness being a fundamental step.
en.method: Derive a Caccioppoli inequality adapted to double phase operators, establish a parabolic embedding theorem, and apply iterative regularity estimates.
en.result: Proves local boundedness of weak solutions under the condition that the coefficient a(x,t) is nonnegative and bounded.
en.help_to_user: Provides a regularity analysis framework for degenerate parabolic problems with double phase operators; the iteration approach may extend to similar nonlinear equations.

idea_spark.idea: Transform anisotropic growth conditions of double phase operators into iterable energy estimates
idea_spark.risk: Oscillations in coefficient a(x,t) may affect regularity conclusions
idea_spark.inspiration: The method could be extended to parabolic equations with variable exponents or non-standard growth conditions

papers.title: Retina gap junctions support the robust perception by warping neural representational geometries along the visual hierarchy
papers.summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to elaborately designed adversarial noise, although they have achieved extraordinary success in many tasks. Compared with DNNs, the human visual system is highly robust. However, it is unclear how the human visual system defends against adversarial attacks, especially the role of the early visual system and its influence on the brain manifold. Due to retina gap junctions being crucial for the denoising function in the early visual system, we combine a retina gap junction-based filter, G-filter, with DNN as an abstract human visual system model called the biological hybrid model. We adopt this model to study the defense performance of retina gap junctions and their impact on the brain manifold. Compared with other defense methods, the biological hybrid model is more robust and can be further improved by introducing noise during training. Next, we analyze the manifold and its decision boundary of the biological hybrid model from a geometry perspective. The results show that the biological hybrid model has a unique 2D decision boundary with high nonlinearity and a lower curvature of the decision boundary of the manifold compared to other defense methods. The transforming manifold may account for the high robustness of the biological hybrid model. Finally, to dissect G-filter and clarify its internal mechanism, we borrow the Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) concept and rewrite G-filter into an equivalent recurrent neural network. The results show that the decision boundary of the model's manifold will gradually change with time and eventually reach a steady state, which is modulated by gap junction conductance, revealing the influence of retina gap junctions on the brain manifold is a gradually evolving process.

ai.tldr: 本研究将视网膜间隙连接（G-filter）与深度神经网络结合，构建生物混合模型，发现其通过扭曲神经表征几何提高对抗鲁棒性，并揭示了间隙连接对大脑流形的影响是一个渐进演化过程。
ai.motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗噪声攻击，而人类视觉系统高度鲁棒。本研究旨在探索人类早期视觉系统（特别是视网膜间隙连接）如何防御对抗攻击及其对大脑神经流形的影响。
ai.method: 构建基于视网膜间隙连接的G-filter，与DNN结合形成生物混合模型；从几何角度分析模型的流形和决策边界；借用神经常微分方程（ODE）概念将G-filter重写为等效循环神经网络以剖析其内部机制。
ai.result: 生物混合模型比其他防御方法更鲁棒，且可通过训练时引入噪声进一步改进；其流形具有独特的二维决策边界、高非线性和较低曲率；G-filter的决策边界随时间逐渐变化至稳态，受间隙连接电导调制。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为理解生物视觉系统的对抗鲁棒性提供了计算模型和几何分析框架，揭示了视网膜间隙连接通过渐进扭曲神经表征几何来增强鲁棒性的机制。

idea_spark.idea: 将视网膜间隙连接的噪声抑制功能建模为G-filter，与DNN堆叠形成生物启发的混合模型，用于研究对抗鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型是对生物视觉的高度简化；G-filter的参数设置可能依赖特定假设；流形分析主要基于二维简化，可能无法完全反映高维特性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 生物系统的渐进信息处理（如间隙连接的动态滤波）可能为构建更鲁棒的AI系统提供新思路；几何视角（流形曲率、决策边界形状）可作为评估模型鲁棒性的新工具。

en.tldr: This study combines retina gap junctions (G-filter) with deep neural networks to build a biological hybrid model, finding that it improves adversarial robustness by warping neural representational geometries, and reveals that the influence of gap junctions on the brain manifold is a gradually evolving process.
en.motivation: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial noise, while the human visual system is highly robust. This research aims to explore how the early visual system (especially retina gap junctions) defends against adversarial attacks and its impact on the brain neural manifold.
en.method: Construct a G-filter based on retina gap junctions and combine it with a DNN to form a biological hybrid model; analyze the model's manifold and decision boundary from a geometric perspective; borrow the Neural ODE concept to rewrite G-filter as an equivalent recurrent neural network to dissect its internal mechanism.
en.result: The biological hybrid model is more robust than other defense methods and can be further improved by introducing noise during training; its manifold has a unique 2D decision boundary with high nonlinearity and lower curvature; the decision boundary of G-filter gradually changes over time to a steady state, modulated by gap junction conductance.
en.help_to_user: This paper provides a computational model and geometric analysis framework for understanding the adversarial robustness of biological vision systems, revealing how retina gap junctions enhance robustness by progressively warping neural representational geometries.

idea_spark.idea: Model the noise suppression function of retina gap junctions as a G-filter and stack it with a DNN to form a bio-inspired hybrid model for studying adversarial robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The model is a high simplification of biological vision; G-filter parameterization may rely on specific assumptions; manifold analysis is largely based on 2D simplifications and may not fully capture high-dimensional properties.
idea_spark.inspiration: Gradual information processing in biological systems (e.g., dynamic filtering via gap junctions) may offer new ideas for building more robust AI systems; geometric perspectives (manifold curvature, decision boundary shape) can serve as new tools for evaluating model robustness.

papers.title: Tube-Based Robust Data-Driven Predictive Control
papers.summary: This paper presents a tractable tube-based robust data-driven predictive control scheme that uses only a single finite noisy input-state trajectory of an unknown discrete-time linear time-invariant (LTI) system. A simplex constraint is imposed on the Hankel coefficient vector, yielding explicit polyhedral bounds on the prediction mismatch induced by bounded measurement noise. Using certified initial and terminal robust positively invariant (RPI) sets, we derive a tube-tightened formulation whose online optimization problem is a strictly convex quadratic program (QP). The resulting controller guarantees recursive feasibility, robust satisfaction of input and state constraints, and practical input-to-state stability of the closed loop with respect to measurement noise. Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness, robustness, and closed-loop performance of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于管道的鲁棒数据驱动预测控制方法，仅使用未知离散线性时不变系统的单条有限噪声输入-状态轨迹。
ai.motivation: 传统模型预测控制需要精确系统模型，而数据驱动方法在噪声环境下难以保证鲁棒性。本文旨在利用有限噪声数据实现具有鲁棒性保证的预测控制。
ai.method: 对Hankel系数向量施加单纯形约束，得到由有界测量噪声引起的预测失配的显式多面体边界；利用经过验证的初始和终端鲁棒正不变集，推导出管道收紧的凸二次规划在线优化问题。
ai.result: 控制器保证了递归可行性、输入和状态约束的鲁棒满足性，以及闭环系统相对于测量噪声的实用输入到状态稳定性。数值算例验证了方法的有效性、鲁棒性和闭环性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为仅凭有限噪声数据实现鲁棒控制提供了理论框架和计算可行的实施方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将数据驱动预测控制与鲁棒不变集理论结合，通过显式噪声边界保证闭环性能。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声统计特性的假设可能在实际复杂扰动下不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将经典鲁棒控制工具与数据驱动框架融合，在模型不确定性和数据有限性间取得平衡。

en.tldr: This paper presents a tube-based robust data-driven predictive control scheme using only a single finite noisy input-state trajectory of an unknown discrete-time LTI system.
en.motivation: Traditional model predictive control requires accurate system models, while data-driven methods struggle to guarantee robustness under noise. This work aims to achieve predictive control with robustness guarantees using limited noisy data.
en.method: Impose a simplex constraint on the Hankel coefficient vector to obtain explicit polyhedral bounds on prediction mismatch induced by bounded measurement noise; derive a tube-tightened convex quadratic programming online optimization using certified initial and terminal robust positively invariant sets.
en.result: The controller guarantees recursive feasibility, robust satisfaction of input and state constraints, and practical input-to-state stability of the closed loop with respect to measurement noise. Numerical examples demonstrate effectiveness, robustness, and closed-loop performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and computationally feasible implementation for achieving robust control using only limited noisy data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine data-driven predictive control with robust invariant set theory to guarantee closed-loop performance through explicit noise bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Assumptions about noise statistics may not hold under actual complex disturbances.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the fusion of classical robust control tools with data-driven frameworks to balance model uncertainty and data limitations.

papers.title: An $L^1$-theory for $p$-Schrödinger equations with confinement in measure
papers.summary: We consider stationary $p$-Schrödinger equations on the whole space with integrable data and potentials that are confining in measure. We introduce asymptotic energy solutions in an asymptotic $L^p$ framework and establish existence and uniqueness in the degenerate range $p\ge2$. The proof relies on a new Rellich$\unicode{x2013}$Kondrachov-type compactness theorem of independent interest, which provides sufficient conditions for families of Sobolev functions to be precompact in asymptotic $L^p$ spaces, without any dimension-dependent restriction on the exponent. For data in the duality regime $L^1(\mathbb{R}^n)\cap L^{p'}(\mathbb{R}^n)$, asymptotic energy solutions coincide with weak energy solutions. We also show that additional compactness assumptions yield localized entropy-type solutions and, under suitable local regularity, distributional solutions.

ai.tldr: 研究具有测度约束的p-Schrödinger方程，在渐近L^p框架下引入渐近能量解，证明p≥2时的存在唯一性，并建立新的紧性定理。
ai.motivation: 处理全空间上具有可积数据和测度约束势的p-Schrödinger方程，传统方法受维度限制，需要新的渐近框架和紧性工具。
ai.method: 引入渐近L^p空间和渐近能量解概念，证明新的Rellich–Kondrachov型紧性定理，不依赖维度限制，并建立解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 在p≥2时证明渐近能量解的存在唯一性；在L^1∩L^{p'}数据下与弱能量解一致；额外紧性假设下得到熵型解和分布解。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有测度约束的p-Schrödinger方程提供了系统的渐近分析框架和紧性工具，适用于退化情形和可积数据。

idea_spark.idea: 将测度约束条件与渐近空间结合，绕过传统紧性定理的维度限制，处理退化非线性问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定的测度约束假设，对于非可积数据或非退化情形可能需要额外调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将渐近分析与几何测度论结合，研究具有奇异势或非光滑域的非线性偏微分方程。

en.tldr: Studies p-Schrödinger equations with confinement in measure, introduces asymptotic energy solutions in asymptotic L^p framework, proves existence and uniqueness for p≥2, and establishes a new compactness theorem.
en.motivation: To handle p-Schrödinger equations on whole space with integrable data and measure-confining potentials, where traditional methods face dimensional restrictions, requiring new asymptotic frameworks and compactness tools.
en.method: Introduces asymptotic L^p spaces and asymptotic energy solutions, proves a new Rellich–Kondrachov-type compactness theorem without dimension-dependent restrictions, and establishes existence and uniqueness of solutions.
en.result: Proves existence and uniqueness of asymptotic energy solutions for p≥2; shows coincidence with weak energy solutions for data in L^1∩L^{p'}; obtains entropy-type and distributional solutions under additional compactness assumptions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic asymptotic analysis framework and compactness tools for p-Schrödinger equations with measure confinement, applicable to degenerate cases and integrable data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine measure confinement conditions with asymptotic spaces to bypass dimensional restrictions of traditional compactness theorems, handling degenerate nonlinear problems.
idea_spark.risk: The approach relies on specific measure confinement assumptions; adjustments may be needed for non-integrable data or non-degenerate cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining asymptotic analysis with geometric measure theory to study nonlinear PDEs with singular potentials or non-smooth domains.

papers.title: Strong and weak rates of convergence in the Smoluchowski--Kramers approximation for stochastic partial differential equations
papers.summary: We consider a class of stochastic damped semilinear wave equations, in the small-mass limit. It has previously been established that the solution converges to the solution of a stochastic semilinear heat equation. In this work we exhibit strong and weak rates of convergence in this Smoluchowski--Kramers approximation result. The rates depend on the regularity of the driving Wiener process. For instance, for trace-class noise the strong and weak rates of convergence are $1$, whereas for space-time white noise (in dimension $1$) the strong and weak rates of convergence are $1/2$ and $1$ respectively.

ai.tldr: 研究一类随机阻尼半线性波方程在小质量极限下的收敛速率，给出了Smoluchowski–Kramers近似中强收敛和弱收敛的具体速率，这些速率取决于驱动维纳过程的正则性。
ai.motivation: 先前研究已证明解收敛于随机半线性热方程的解，但收敛速率尚未明确。
ai.method: 通过分析随机阻尼半线性波方程在小质量极限下的渐近行为，推导强收敛和弱收敛速率。
ai.result: 对于迹类噪声，强收敛和弱收敛速率均为1；对于一维时空白噪声，强收敛速率为1/2，弱收敛速率为1。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机偏微分方程的小质量极限收敛性提供了定量速率估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将收敛速率分析应用于其他类型的随机波动方程或不同噪声结构
idea_spark.risk: 高维或更奇异噪声情形下速率可能不同
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对随机动力系统不同收敛模式（强/弱）的系统比较研究

en.tldr: Establishes strong and weak convergence rates in the Smoluchowski–Kramers approximation for stochastic damped wave equations in the small-mass limit, with rates depending on the regularity of the driving Wiener process.
en.motivation: While convergence to a stochastic heat equation was previously known, the rates of convergence remained unquantified.
en.method: Analyzes the asymptotic behavior of stochastic damped semilinear wave equations as mass tends to zero to derive explicit convergence rates.
en.result: For trace-class noise, both strong and weak convergence rates are 1; for space-time white noise in dimension 1, strong rate is 1/2 and weak rate is 1.
en.help_to_user: Provides quantitative rate estimates for convergence in the small-mass limit of stochastic PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Apply rate analysis to other types of stochastic wave equations or different noise structures
idea_spark.risk: Rates may differ in higher dimensions or for more singular noise
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic comparison of different convergence modes (strong/weak) in stochastic dynamical systems

papers.title: Minimal Input Cardinality Disturbance Decoupling of Coupled Oscillators via Output Feedback with Application to Power Networks
papers.summary: In this paper, we identify the smallest set of control input nodes and an associated output feedback law that achieves complete disturbance decoupling for a class of coupled oscillator networks. The focus is specifically on systems linearized around a stable phase-locked synchronized state. The proposed theoretical framework is applied to the linearized swing dynamics of power grids operating near synchronization. In this context, the disturbance decoupling problem corresponds to isolating subsets of nodes from exogenous disturbances by means of batteries that can both add or withdraw active power. Numerical simulations carried out on the IEEE New England 39-bus system show that the proposed methodology not only yields a minimal actuator placement ensuring effective disturbance rejection, but also preserves the internal stability of the closed-loop system.

ai.tldr: 针对一类耦合振荡器网络，识别了实现完全扰动解耦的最小控制输入节点集及相应的输出反馈律，并将其应用于电力网络线性化摆动动力学。
ai.motivation: 在电力网络等耦合振荡器系统中，如何以最少的执行器实现对外部扰动的有效隔离，同时保持系统内部稳定性，是一个关键的控制问题。
ai.method: 针对稳定锁相同步状态附近的线性化系统，提出理论框架，识别最小控制输入节点集并设计输出反馈律，应用于电力网络线性化摆动模型，通过电池充放电实现有功功率的注入与吸收。
ai.result: 在IEEE新英格兰39节点系统上的数值仿真表明，该方法不仅能获得确保有效扰动抑制的最小执行器配置，还能保持闭环系统的内部稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为网络化振荡系统（尤其是电力网络）的鲁棒控制提供了一种最小化执行器配置的扰动解耦设计方法。

idea_spark.idea: 该方法可迁移至其他网络化动态系统（如交通流、生物振荡网络）的鲁棒控制问题，用于识别关键控制节点并设计解耦控制器。
idea_spark.risk: 理论依赖于系统在稳定平衡点附近的线性化，对于强非线性或大范围动态可能不适用；实际执行器（如电池）的动态约束未在模型中充分考虑。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将图论、结构控制理论与具体物理系统（如微电网、机械振动网络）结合，研究具有物理约束的最小资源控制问题。

zh.tldr: 针对一类耦合振荡器网络，识别了实现完全扰动解耦的最小控制输入节点集及相应的输出反馈律，并将其应用于电力网络线性化摆动动力学。
zh.motivation: 在电力网络等耦合振荡器系统中，如何以最少的执行器实现对外部扰动的有效隔离，同时保持系统内部稳定性，是一个关键的控制问题。
zh.method: 针对稳定锁相同步状态附近的线性化系统，提出理论框架，识别最小控制输入节点集并设计输出反馈律，应用于电力网络线性化摆动模型，通过电池充放电实现有功功率的注入与吸收。
zh.result: 在IEEE新英格兰39节点系统上的数值仿真表明，该方法不仅能获得确保有效扰动抑制的最小执行器配置，还能保持闭环系统的内部稳定性。

en.tldr: Identifies the minimal set of control input nodes and an associated output feedback law for complete disturbance decoupling in a class of coupled oscillator networks, applied to the linearized swing dynamics of power grids.
en.motivation: A key control problem in coupled oscillator systems like power networks is how to effectively isolate external disturbances with minimal actuators while preserving internal stability.
en.method: Proposes a theoretical framework for systems linearized around a stable phase-locked state, identifying the minimal control input set and designing an output feedback law. Applied to linearized swing dynamics of power grids, using batteries to inject/absorb active power.
en.result: Numerical simulations on the IEEE New England 39-bus system show the method yields a minimal actuator placement for effective disturbance rejection while preserving closed-loop internal stability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for designing disturbance decoupling with minimal actuator configuration for networked oscillatory systems, particularly power networks.

idea_spark.idea: Transferable to robust control problems in other networked dynamical systems (e.g., traffic flow, biological oscillatory networks) to identify critical control nodes and design decoupling controllers.
idea_spark.risk: Theory relies on linearization around a stable equilibrium; may not hold for strongly nonlinear or large-signal dynamics. Practical actuator (e.g., battery) dynamics are not fully modeled.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining graph theory, structural control theory, and physical systems (e.g., microgrids, mechanical vibration networks) to study minimal-resource control with physical constraints.

papers.title: On the inverse scattering transform for the KdV equation with summable initial data
papers.summary: We consider the Cauchy problem for the Korteweg--de Vries equation with real initial data $q$ that is both $L^1$ and $L^2$ summable and supported on (0,\infty). Using the left reflection coefficient and Hankel operators on the Hardy space $H^2$, we derive a trace-type representation for the corresponding solution. The proof is based on approximation by compactly supported potentials, uniform convergence of the associated reflection coefficients away from the origin, and continuity properties of the resulting Hankel operators. This yields a rigorous inverse scattering construction for a class of summable half-line supported initial data beyond the standard short-range setting.

ai.tldr: 研究具有可和初始数据的KdV方程的柯西问题，利用左反射系数和Hardy空间上的Hankel算子，为半直线支撑的初始数据建立了严格的逆散射构造。
ai.motivation: 标准短程势理论无法处理一类更广泛的、支撑在半直线上且可和的初始数据，需要扩展逆散射方法的适用范围。
ai.method: 通过紧支撑势的逼近、反射系数在原点的均匀收敛性以及所得Hankel算子的连续性，基于左反射系数和Hardy空间H^2上的Hankel算子推导解的一种迹型表示。
ai.result: 为支撑在(0,∞)上的L^1和L^2可和实初始数据类，提供了严格的逆散射构造，得到了解的显式表示。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理非标准短程势的KdV方程提供了严格的数学框架和构造性方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Hankel算子在Hardy空间上的性质，将散射数据转化为解的迹型表示。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于初始数据的特定可和性及支撑条件，推广到更一般的支撑或复值数据可能需要新的工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将函数空间中的算子方法与可积系统的逆问题结合，以处理更广泛的初值类。

en.tldr: Studies the Cauchy problem for the KdV equation with summable initial data, using the left reflection coefficient and Hankel operators on the Hardy space to establish a rigorous inverse scattering construction for half-line supported data.
en.motivation: To extend the inverse scattering method beyond the standard short-range setting to a broader class of summable initial data supported on a half-line.
en.method: Derives a trace-type representation for the solution using the left reflection coefficient and Hankel operators on H^2, based on approximation by compactly supported potentials, uniform convergence of reflection coefficients away from the origin, and continuity properties of the resulting Hankel operators.
en.result: Provides a rigorous inverse scattering construction for real initial data in L^1∩L^2 supported on (0,∞), yielding an explicit representation of the solution.
en.help_to_user: Offers a rigorous mathematical framework and constructive method for handling the KdV equation with non-standard short-range potentials.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize properties of Hankel operators on Hardy space to transform scattering data into a trace-type representation of the solution.
idea_spark.risk: The method heavily relies on specific summability and support conditions of the initial data; extension to more general supports or complex-valued data may require new tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining operator methods in function spaces with inverse problems for integrable systems to handle broader classes of initial data.

papers.title: The Euler-Maruyama method for invariant measures of McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equations
papers.summary: This paper investigates the approximation of invariant measures for McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equations (SDEs) using the Euler-Maruyama (EM) scheme under a monotonicity condition. Firstly, the convergence of the numerical solution from the EM scheme to its continuous-time counterpart is established. Secondly, we show that the numerical solution admits a unique invariant measure and derive its convergence rate under the Wasserstein metric. In parallel, it is demonstrated that the associated particle system also possesses these properties.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了在单调性条件下，使用Euler-Maruyama格式逼近McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程不变测度的方法。
ai.motivation: McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程的不变测度在理论分析和应用中具有重要意义，需要有效的数值逼近方法。
ai.method: 采用Euler-Maruyama离散化格式，在单调性条件下分析数值解的性质，并建立相关粒子系统的对应结果。
ai.result: 证明了数值解收敛于连续时间解，数值解存在唯一不变测度，并在Wasserstein度量下给出了收敛速率，粒子系统也具有相同性质。
ai.help_to_user: 为McKean-Vlasov方程不变测度的数值计算提供了理论保证和具体方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒子系统的不变测度性质与离散化格式的不变测度性质统一分析。
idea_spark.risk: 单调性条件可能限制方程类型的适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索其他数值格式（如Milstein方法）在相同框架下的表现。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the approximation of invariant measures for McKean-Vlasov SDEs using the Euler-Maruyama scheme under a monotonicity condition.
en.motivation: Invariant measures of McKean-Vlasov SDEs are important for theoretical analysis and applications, requiring effective numerical approximation methods.
en.method: The Euler-Maruyama discretization scheme is employed, analyzing properties of the numerical solution under monotonicity conditions, with corresponding results established for the associated particle system.
en.result: Convergence of the numerical solution to the continuous-time counterpart is proved, the numerical solution admits a unique invariant measure with convergence rate under the Wasserstein metric, and the particle system shares these properties.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees and concrete methods for numerical computation of invariant measures for McKean-Vlasov equations.

idea_spark.idea: Unify the analysis of invariant measure properties for both particle systems and discretization schemes.
idea_spark.risk: The monotonicity condition may limit the applicability to certain equation types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore the performance of other numerical schemes (e.g., Milstein method) within the same framework.

papers.title: Simplification Ad Absurdum? Revisiting Gas Flow Modeling for Integrated Energy System Planning
papers.summary: This paper analyzes the implications of simplified pipeline gas flow models for integrated energy system planning. A case study of an integrated power-hydrogen expansion planning problem shows that simplifying pressure-flow relationships and gas dynamics can lead to expansion plans that incur substantial regret when evaluated under a more realistic dynamic gas flow model -- due to suboptimal system expansion, operation, and non-supplied hydrogen. Numerical experiments show that planning under the highly simplified transport and transport-linepack models -- commonly used in expansion studies -- can result in regret exceeding several thousand percent and yield expansion plans that lack robustness across demand levels. Planning under steady-state conditions partially mitigates these effects, but still leaves significant cost-reduction potential untapped compared to dynamic planning due to neglected linepack flexibility. Developing efficient solution algorithms for the dynamic model is a promising direction for future research.

ai.tldr: 本文分析简化管道气流模型对综合能源系统规划的影响，发现过度简化会导致规划方案在实际动态气流模型下产生巨大成本遗憾。
ai.motivation: 综合能源系统规划中常使用简化的气流模型，但其对规划结果稳健性的影响尚未充分量化。
ai.method: 通过电力-氢气扩展规划案例研究，比较简化模型（运输模型、运输线储模型）与动态气流模型下的规划结果。
ai.result: 简化模型导致的规划遗憾可超过数千百分比，且规划方案在不同需求水平下缺乏稳健性；稳态规划部分缓解问题，但仍未充分利用线储灵活性。
ai.help_to_user: 为能源系统规划者提供模型简化风险的定量证据，强调动态建模的重要性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发高效求解动态气流模型的算法，以平衡计算复杂度与规划精度。
idea_spark.risk: 动态模型计算成本高，可能难以应用于大规模系统；需在精度与求解效率间权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用线储灵活性作为虚拟储能，提升综合能源系统的运行弹性与经济性。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes the impact of simplified pipeline gas flow models on integrated energy system planning, showing that oversimplification leads to substantial cost regret when evaluated under realistic dynamic flow models.
en.motivation: Simplified gas flow models are commonly used in integrated energy system planning, but their impact on plan robustness has not been fully quantified.
en.method: A case study of power-hydrogen expansion planning compares results from simplified models (transport and transport-linepack) with those from a dynamic gas flow model.
en.result: Simplified models can cause regret exceeding several thousand percent and yield non-robust plans across demand levels; steady-state planning partially mitigates issues but still neglects linepack flexibility.
en.help_to_user: Provides quantitative evidence of the risks of model simplification for energy system planners, emphasizing the importance of dynamic modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Develop efficient solution algorithms for dynamic gas flow models to balance computational complexity and planning accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: High computational cost of dynamic models may limit scalability; trade-offs between accuracy and solve time are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Utilize linepack flexibility as virtual storage to enhance operational resilience and economics of integrated energy systems.

papers.title: Beyond the Laplacian: Doubly Stochastic Matrices for Graph Neural Networks
papers.summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) conventionally rely on standard Laplacian or adjacency matrices for structural message passing. In this work, we substitute the traditional Laplacian with a Doubly Stochastic graph Matrix (DSM), derived from the inverse of the modified Laplacian, to naturally encode continuous multi-hop proximity and strict local centrality. To overcome the intractable $O(n^3)$ complexity of exact matrix inversion, we first utilize a truncated Neumann series to scalably approximate the DSM, which serves as the foundation for our proposed DsmNet. Furthermore, because algebraic truncation inherently causes probability mass leakage, we introduce DsmNet-compensate. This variant features a mathematically rigorous Residual Mass Compensation mechanism that analytically re-injects the truncated tail mass into self-loops, strictly restoring row-stochasticity and structural dominance. Extensive theoretical and empirical analyses demonstrate that our decoupled architectures operate efficiently in $O(K|E|)$ time and effectively mitigate over-smoothing by bounding Dirichlet energy decay, providing robust empirical validation on homophilic benchmarks. Finally, we establish the theoretical boundaries of the DSM on heterophilic topologies and demonstrate its versatility as a continuous structural encoding for Graph Transformers.

ai.tldr: 本研究提出用双随机矩阵替代传统拉普拉斯矩阵进行图神经网络消息传递，通过截断诺依曼级数近似和残差质量补偿机制，实现高效计算并缓解过平滑问题。
ai.motivation: 传统GNN依赖标准拉普拉斯或邻接矩阵进行消息传递，存在计算复杂度和过平滑等限制。
ai.method: 1. 用修正拉普拉斯矩阵的逆导出双随机矩阵编码多跳邻近性；2. 使用截断诺依曼级数近似实现O(K|E|)复杂度；3. 提出残差质量补偿机制严格恢复行随机性。
ai.result: 理论证明可约束狄利克雷能量衰减缓解过平滑，在齐性图基准上有效验证，并建立了在异配图上的理论边界。
ai.help_to_user: 为GNN提供了一种连续的结构编码方案，可作为图Transformer的结构编码模块。

idea_spark.idea: 将概率质量泄漏问题转化为可解析补偿的自环权重调整。
idea_spark.risk: 诺依曼级数近似的收敛性依赖于图谱性质，在病态矩阵上可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过严格数学约束保持矩阵性质（如随机性）来提升模型鲁棒性的设计思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将概率质量泄漏问题转化为可解析补偿的自环权重调整。
idea_spark.risk: 诺依曼级数近似的收敛性依赖于图谱性质，在病态矩阵上可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过严格数学约束保持矩阵性质（如随机性）来提升模型鲁棒性的设计思路。

en.tldr: This work substitutes the traditional Laplacian with a Doubly Stochastic Matrix for GNN message passing, using truncated Neumann series approximation and a Residual Mass Compensation mechanism to achieve efficient computation and mitigate over-smoothing.
en.motivation: Conventional GNNs rely on standard Laplacian or adjacency matrices for message passing, facing limitations in computational complexity and over-smoothing.
en.method: 1. Derive DSM from the inverse of modified Laplacian to encode multi-hop proximity; 2. Use truncated Neumann series for scalable O(K|E|) approximation; 3. Introduce Residual Mass Compensation to strictly restore row-stochasticity.
en.result: Theoretical analysis shows bounded Dirichlet energy decay mitigates over-smoothing, with empirical validation on homophilic benchmarks and established theoretical bounds on heterophilic topologies.
en.help_to_user: Provides a continuous structural encoding for GNNs that can serve as a structural module for Graph Transformers.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming probability mass leakage into analytically compensatable self-loop weight adjustments.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of Neumann series approximation depends on graph spectral properties and may be unstable for ill-conditioned matrices.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design philosophy of maintaining mathematical properties (e.g., stochasticity) through rigorous constraints to enhance model robustness.

papers.title: A Robust Optimization Approach for Scheduling with Uncertain Start-Time Dependent Costs
papers.summary: In this work, we study a single-machine scheduling problem that aims at minimizing the total cost of a schedule subject to start-time dependent costs. This framework naturally captures scenarios where costs fluctuate throughout the day, such as time-varying energy or labor prices. To model more realistic scenarios, we assume that these costs lie within a budgeted uncertainty set and propose a two-stage robust optimization approach. In a first stage, the order in which activities should be executed is decided. After a cost scenario has been revealed, the starting times for each activity are established, subject to the ordering from the first stage. We demonstrate that the proposed problem is NP-hard and not approximable, implying the complexity of its robust counterpart. Furthermore, we show that already evaluating a first-stage solution is NP-hard when the uncertainty set is discrete. We develop models and solution methods for both continuous and discrete budgeted uncertainty. In computational experiments, we compare these approaches and demonstrate the advantages of including uncertainty beforehand.

ai.tldr: 研究具有不确定开始时间依赖成本的单机调度问题，采用两阶段鲁棒优化方法处理预算不确定性集。
ai.motivation: 实际调度场景中成本（如能源、劳动力价格）随时间波动且不确定，需要鲁棒优化方法。
ai.method: 第一阶段决定活动执行顺序，第二阶段在成本场景揭示后确定开始时间。针对连续和离散预算不确定性开发模型与求解方法。

en.tldr: Studies a single-machine scheduling problem with uncertain start-time dependent costs using a two-stage robust optimization approach under budgeted uncertainty sets.
en.motivation: Real-world scheduling involves time-varying costs (e.g., energy, labor) that are uncertain, requiring robust optimization methods.
en.method: First stage decides activity ordering; second stage determines start times after cost scenario revelation. Models and solution methods developed for both continuous and discrete budgeted uncertainty.
en.result: Proves the problem is NP-hard and inapproximable; evaluating a first-stage solution is NP-hard under discrete uncertainty. Computational experiments demonstrate advantages of incorporating uncertainty a priori.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust optimization framework and solution approaches for scheduling problems with uncertain time-dependent costs.

idea_spark.idea: Decouple sequencing decisions from timing decisions to separately handle structural and parametric uncertainty.
idea_spark.risk: High computational complexity for evaluating solutions under discrete uncertainty may limit large-scale applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore heuristic or approximation methods for discrete uncertainty, or integrate data-driven approaches to refine uncertainty sets.

papers.title: Global in time justification of a two-phase averaged system for heat-conducting ideal gases
papers.summary: In this article, we mathematically justify (globally in time) a Baer-Nunziato type system from the non-isentropic compressible Navier-Sokes equations for heat conducting ideal gases posed over the torus and in one space dimension. The breakthrough in this paper is to define and prove the global existence of solutions in a framework intermediate between weak and strong solutions and then to derive the system through homogenization and Young measures characterization. Note that the main difficulty is to derive a priori uniform bounds on appropriate unknowns in the presence of piecewise constant coefficients (viscosity and adiabatic constants) exhibiting rapid oscillations between two positive values.

ai.tldr: 本文从数学上证明了热传导理想气体的一维非等熵可压缩Navier-Stokes方程可全局时间地推导出Baer-Nunziato型两相平均系统。
ai.motivation: 在具有快速振荡的分段常数系数（粘性和绝热常数）下，为适当未知量建立先验一致估计是主要困难，需要新的分析框架。
ai.method: 定义并证明介于弱解和强解之间的解框架的全局存在性，然后通过均匀化和Young测度刻画推导出该系统。
ai.result: 成功证明了该两相平均系统在全局时间范围内的数学合理性，突破了分段系数振荡带来的分析障碍。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有振荡系数的多相可压缩流模型提供了严格的数学证明框架和全局存在性理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将均匀化理论与Young测度结合，处理快速振荡的分段常数系数，建立先验估计。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能依赖于一维环面几何和理想气体假设，向高维或更复杂状态方程的推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 为多相流体中材料参数剧烈变化的问题提供了数学工具，可能启发复合材料或多孔介质中类似问题的分析。

en.tldr: This paper mathematically justifies (globally in time) a Baer-Nunziato type two-phase averaged system derived from the one-dimensional non-isentropic compressible Navier-Stokes equations for heat-conducting ideal gases.
en.motivation: The main difficulty is to derive a priori uniform bounds on appropriate unknowns in the presence of piecewise constant coefficients (viscosity and adiabatic constants) exhibiting rapid oscillations between two positive values.
en.method: Define and prove the global existence of solutions in a framework intermediate between weak and strong solutions, then derive the system through homogenization and Young measures characterization.
en.result: Successfully justifies the two-phase averaged system globally in time, overcoming analytical obstacles posed by oscillatory piecewise coefficients.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical proof framework and global existence theory for multiphase compressible flow models with oscillatory coefficients.

idea_spark.idea: Combine homogenization theory with Young measures to handle rapidly oscillating piecewise constant coefficients and establish a priori estimates.
idea_spark.risk: The approach may rely on the one-dimensional torus geometry and ideal gas assumptions; extension to higher dimensions or more complex equations of state requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Provides mathematical tools for problems with sharply varying material parameters in multiphase flows, potentially inspiring similar analyses for composite materials or porous media.

papers.title: Homogenization of the Navier-Stokes equations in a randomly perforated domain in the inviscid limit
papers.summary: We study the behaviour of the solution $u_\varepsilon$ to the Navier-Stokes equations with vanishing viscosity and a non-slip condition in a randomly perforated domain. We consider the space $\mathbb{R}^3$ where we remove $N$ holes that are i.i.d. distributed. The behaviour depends on the particle size $\varepsilon^α=N^{-α/3}$ and the viscosity $\varepsilon^γ=N^{-γ/3}$ of the fluid. We prove quantitative convergence results to a function $u$, provided that the local Reynolds number is small, in the subcritical ($α+γ>3$) and critical ($α+γ=3$) regime. In the first case, $u$ solves the Euler equations, whereas in the second case $u$ solves the Euler-Brinkman equations. This extends the results of https://doi.org/10.1088/1361-6544/acfe56 from the periodic to the random setting. We only treat the case $α>2$ so that the particles do not overlap with overwhelming probability.

ai.tldr: 研究随机穿孔域中Navier-Stokes方程在黏性趋于零时的均匀化行为，证明在亚临界和临界条件下解的定量收敛性。
ai.motivation: 将周期性穿孔域的结果推广到随机穿孔域，研究随机分布孔洞对流体方程均匀化的影响。
ai.method: 分析粒子尺寸ε^α与流体黏度ε^γ的关系，在局部雷诺数较小的条件下，通过数学证明建立收敛结果。
ai.result: 在亚临界(α+γ>3)条件下收敛到Euler方程，在临界(α+γ=3)条件下收敛到Euler-Brinkman方程。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了随机穿孔域中Navier-Stokes方程均匀化的严格数学框架，适用于多孔介质流体力学研究。

en.tldr: Studies homogenization of Navier-Stokes equations in randomly perforated domains in the inviscid limit, proving quantitative convergence in subcritical and critical regimes.
en.motivation: Extends results from periodic to random perforated domains, investigating effects of randomly distributed holes on fluid equation homogenization.
en.method: Analyzes relationship between particle size ε^α and fluid viscosity ε^γ, establishing convergence results under small local Reynolds number conditions through mathematical proofs.
en.result: Convergence to Euler equations in subcritical (α+γ>3) regime and to Euler-Brinkman equations in critical (α+γ=3) regime.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical framework for homogenization of Navier-Stokes equations in randomly perforated domains, applicable to porous media fluid dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Applying asymptotic analysis of randomly perforated domains to other transport equations or more complex boundary conditions
idea_spark.risk: Requires rigorous probabilistic estimates and functional analysis tools
idea_spark.inspiration: Homogenization theory in random media could be extended to biological fluids or geological seepage problems

papers.title: Fluctuations for the Toda lattice
papers.summary: In this paper we consider the Toda lattice $(\mathbf{p}(t);\mathbf{q}(t))$ at thermal equilibrium, meaning that its variables $(p_j)$ and $(e^{q_j - q_{j+1}})$ are independent Gaussian and Gamma random variables, respectively. We show under diffusive scaling that the space-time fluctuations for the model's currents converge to an explicit Gaussian limit. As consequences, we deduce, (i) the scaling limit for the trajectory of a single particle $q_0$ is a Brownian motion; (ii) space-time two-point correlation functions for the model decay inversely with time, with explicit scaling distributions predicted by Spohn (Spohn, J. Phys. A 53 (2020), 265004). Our starting point is the notion that the Toda lattice can be thought of as a dense collection of many ``quasi-particles'' that interact through scattering. The core of our work is to establish that the full joint scaling limit of the fluctuations for these quasi-particles is given by a Gaussian process, called a dressed Lévy-Chentsov field.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了热平衡状态下Toda晶格的空间时间涨落，证明其电流在扩散标度下收敛于显式高斯极限，并推导出单粒子轨迹的布朗运动极限及两点关联函数的衰减规律。
ai.motivation: Toda晶格作为可积系统，其热平衡态下的涨落行为尚缺乏严格的标度极限描述，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
ai.method: 将Toda晶格视为密集相互作用的准粒子集合，通过建立准粒子涨落的联合标度极限为高斯过程（修饰Lévy-Chentsov场）来推导结果。
ai.result: 电流涨落收敛于显式高斯极限；单粒子轨迹标度极限为布朗运动；时空两点关联函数按时间倒数衰减，与Spohn的理论预测一致。
ai.help_to_user: 为可积晶格系统的统计力学提供了严格的涨落标度极限证明，建立了准粒子描述与高斯过程极限之间的桥梁。

idea_spark.idea: 将高维晶格涨落问题转化为准粒子系统的联合标度极限分析
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于Toda晶格的可积性，推广到非可积系统可能需要新工具
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可能适用于其他具有准粒子描述的多体系统涨落分析

en.tldr: This paper studies space-time fluctuations of the Toda lattice at thermal equilibrium, showing that its currents converge under diffusive scaling to an explicit Gaussian limit, and deriving Brownian motion scaling for single-particle trajectories and inverse-time decay of two-point correlations.
en.motivation: The scaling limit description of fluctuations for the integrable Toda lattice at thermal equilibrium remains theoretically incomplete; this work aims to provide rigorous scaling limit results.
en.method: Treating the Toda lattice as a dense collection of interacting quasi-particles, we establish that the full joint scaling limit of their fluctuations is given by a Gaussian process (dressed Lévy-Chentsov field).
en.result: Current fluctuations converge to an explicit Gaussian limit; single-particle trajectory scaling limit is Brownian motion; space-time two-point correlation functions decay inversely with time, matching Spohn's theoretical predictions.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous scaling limit proofs for fluctuations in integrable lattice statistical mechanics, bridging quasi-particle descriptions with Gaussian process limits.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming high-dimensional lattice fluctuation problems into joint scaling limit analysis of quasi-particle systems
idea_spark.risk: The approach relies on integrability of the Toda lattice; extension to non-integrable systems may require new tools
idea_spark.inspiration: This framework may be applicable to fluctuation analysis of other many-body systems with quasi-particle descriptions

papers.title: LeapAlign: Post-Training Flow Matching Models at Any Generation Step by Building Two-Step Trajectories
papers.summary: This paper focuses on the alignment of flow matching models with human preferences. A promising way is fine-tuning by directly backpropagating reward gradients through the differentiable generation process of flow matching. However, backpropagating through long trajectories results in prohibitive memory costs and gradient explosion. Therefore, direct-gradient methods struggle to update early generation steps, which are crucial for determining the global structure of the final image. To address this issue, we introduce LeapAlign, a fine-tuning method that reduces computational cost and enables direct gradient propagation from reward to early generation steps. Specifically, we shorten the long trajectory into only two steps by designing two consecutive leaps, each skipping multiple ODE sampling steps and predicting future latents in a single step. By randomizing the start and end timesteps of the leaps, LeapAlign leads to efficient and stable model updates at any generation step. To better use such shortened trajectories, we assign higher training weights to those that are more consistent with the long generation path. To further enhance gradient stability, we reduce the weights of gradient terms with large magnitude, instead of completely removing them as done in previous works. When fine-tuning the Flux model, LeapAlign consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GRPO-based and direct-gradient methods across various metrics, achieving superior image quality and image-text alignment.

ai.tldr: LeapAlign是一种用于流匹配模型的后训练对齐方法，通过构建两步轨迹，显著降低了计算成本并实现了从奖励到早期生成步骤的直接梯度传播。
ai.motivation: 直接通过长轨迹反向传播奖励梯度会导致极高的内存成本和梯度爆炸，使得难以更新对最终图像全局结构至关重要的早期生成步骤。
ai.method: 设计两个连续的跳跃，每个跳跃跳过多个ODE采样步骤，在单步内预测未来潜在变量，从而将长轨迹缩短为仅两步。通过随机化跳跃的起始和结束时间步，并结合与长生成路径更一致的轨迹的更高训练权重，实现高效稳定的模型更新。
ai.result: 在微调Flux模型时，LeapAlign在各种指标上持续优于最先进的基于GRPO的方法和直接梯度方法，实现了更优的图像质量和图文对齐。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效且稳定的后训练对齐方案，适用于需要基于人类偏好微调流匹配或扩散模型的场景，尤其关注改善早期生成步骤。

idea_spark.idea: 核心是构建‘捷径’轨迹来近似长程依赖，而非直接处理完整序列。
idea_spark.risk: 两步跳跃可能无法完全捕捉原始长轨迹中的所有复杂动态，存在近似误差。需要设计合理的权重机制来筛选高质量的近似轨迹。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在于：对于难以端到端优化的长过程，可以主动设计简化的、但覆盖关键阶段的代理过程来进行高效优化。

en.tldr: LeapAlign is a post-training alignment method for flow matching models that builds two-step trajectories, significantly reducing computational cost and enabling direct gradient propagation from rewards to early generation steps.
en.motivation: Directly backpropagating reward gradients through long trajectories results in prohibitive memory costs and gradient explosion, making it difficult to update early generation steps crucial for determining the global structure of the final image.
en.method: Designs two consecutive leaps, each skipping multiple ODE sampling steps and predicting future latents in a single step, thereby shortening the long trajectory to only two steps. By randomizing the start and end timesteps of the leaps and assigning higher training weights to trajectories more consistent with the long generation path, it enables efficient and stable model updates.
en.result: When fine-tuning the Flux model, LeapAlign consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GRPO-based and direct-gradient methods across various metrics, achieving superior image quality and image-text alignment.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and stable post-training alignment solution for scenarios requiring fine-tuning of flow matching or diffusion models based on human preferences, with particular focus on improving early generation steps.

idea_spark.idea: The core is to construct 'shortcut' trajectories to approximate long-range dependencies, rather than handling the full sequence directly.
idea_spark.risk: The two-step leap may not fully capture all complex dynamics in the original long trajectory, introducing approximation error. A well-designed weighting mechanism is needed to select high-quality approximate trajectories.
idea_spark.inspiration: The inspiration is that for long processes difficult to optimize end-to-end, one can proactively design simplified proxy processes that cover key stages for efficient optimization.

papers.title: Pricing Electric Vehicle Charging and Station Access via Copositive Duality
papers.summary: Optimized charging of electric vehicles (EVs) at public locations consists of two decisions: how much energy to deliver at what times, which is continuous, and where to plug in, which is binary. This makes optimizing EV charging a mixed-integer linear program (MILP). This discreteness undermines traditional marginal pricing methods. In this paper, we develop the first marginal-price-based mechanism for pricing EV charging with binary station access constraints. Using the result of Burer (2009), we express the EV charging as a completely positive program (CPP), whose dual is a copositive program (COP). This convex dual admits valid shadow prices even though the original allocation problem is discrete and nonconvex. By interpreting the COP dual variables as marginal prices, we construct a pricing mechanism that captures EV supply equipment (EVSE) congestion as well as charging-capacity limits. We prove that the resulting mechanism is revenue-adequate for the operator and individually rational for every EV user, in the strong sense that each user maximizes their own welfare by accepting their assigned charging plan rather than deviating to any alternative option. We further develop problem-specific inner-approximation and dimension-reduction techniques that substantially improve the computational tractability of solving the COP in our setting. Numerical experiments on both small and large scale charging instances demonstrate that our pricing mechanism captures discrete congestion effects and aligns user incentives with the system-optimal assignment, outperforming time-of-use (TOU) and convex relaxation benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 本文首次提出基于边际定价的电动汽车充电与充电桩接入定价机制，通过完全正规划与余正规划对偶处理离散约束，保证运营商收益充足与用户个体理性。
ai.motivation: 电动汽车公共充电优化包含连续充电量与离散桩位选择，形成混合整数线性规划，传统边际定价方法因离散性失效。
ai.method: 利用Burer(2009)结果将充电问题表述为完全正规划，其对偶为余正规划，通过凸对偶获得有效影子价格，并开发内近似与降维技术提升计算可行性。
ai.result: 定价机制能捕捉充电设备拥堵与容量限制，数值实验表明其优于分时电价与凸松弛基准，有效协调用户激励与系统最优分配。
ai.help_to_user: 为离散资源分配的边际定价提供了数学框架，适用于充电桩、共享交通等含二元约束的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将混合整数规划重构为完全正规划，利用凸对偶获得离散问题的边际价格。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度仍可能随问题规模增长，需依赖特定近似技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将组合优化问题转化为连续凸对偶进行定价的新思路，突破传统边际定价的离散性限制。

papers.title: On the tails of Dickman-like perpetuities
papers.summary: By using a probabilistic technique based on the exponential change of measure we find a precise tail asymptotic behavior of some perpetuities with distributions close to the Dickman distribution.

ai.tldr: 使用基于指数测度变换的概率技术，精确刻画了接近Dickman分布的永续年金尾部分布渐近行为。
ai.motivation: Dickman分布及其类似分布在数论和概率论中具有重要地位，但其尾部分布的精确渐近行为尚未被充分研究。
ai.method: 采用指数测度变换的概率技术，对接近Dickman分布的永续年金分布进行分析。
ai.result: 获得了这类永续年金尾部分布的精确渐近表达式。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究Dickman类分布的尾部分布提供了精确的分析工具和结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将Dickman分布尾部分析方法扩展到更一般的永续年金模型。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于特定的分布假设，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对类似分布的尾部分布进行系统性渐近研究。
