en.tldr: Using a probabilistic technique based on exponential change of measure, we precisely characterize the tail asymptotic behavior of perpetuities with distributions close to the Dickman distribution.
en.motivation: The Dickman distribution and its variants play important roles in number theory and probability theory, but the precise asymptotic behavior of their tail distributions has not been fully studied.
en.method: Employing the probabilistic technique of exponential change of measure to analyze perpetuities with distributions approximating the Dickman distribution.
en.result: Obtained precise asymptotic expressions for the tail distributions of such perpetuities.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise analytical tools and results for studying tail distributions of Dickman-like distributions.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the Dickman distribution tail analysis method to more general perpetuity models.
idea_spark.risk: The method may rely on specific distributional assumptions, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic asymptotic studies of tail distributions for similar distributions.

papers.title: The Multinomial Allocation Model and the Size of a Randomly Chosen Box
papers.summary: We revisit the random allocation of $n$ balls into $N$ boxes with probabilities $q_1,\ldots,q_N$, focusing on the proportion $\hat q_r$ of boxes containing exactly $r$ balls. Classical asymptotic results for the expectations, variances, and covariances of these proportions are reformulated in terms of the size distribution of a randomly chosen box. We further derive explicit two-sided bounds for the associated remainder terms, allowing for weaker assumptions than those previously required.

ai.tldr: 本文重新审视了将n个球随机分配到N个盒子中的经典模型，重点关注恰好包含r个球的盒子比例，并给出了相关统计量的渐近结果及余项的双边界。
ai.motivation: 经典随机分配模型中，关于盒子包含特定球数比例的期望、方差和协方差的渐近结果需要更弱的假设和更精确的余项控制。
ai.method: 通过随机选择盒子的尺寸分布重新表述经典渐近结果，并推导出余项项的显式双边界，放宽了先前所需的假设条件。
ai.result: 获得了在较弱假设下关于盒子比例统计量的渐近表达式，并提供了明确的余项界，改进了现有理论结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机分配问题的概率分析提供了更精确的数学工具和理论保证，适用于需要评估分配均匀性的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将盒子比例问题转化为随机选择盒子的尺寸分布，从而统一渐近分析并推导更紧的误差界。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于渐近假设，在有限样本情况下可能需要额外的数值验证或修正。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对离散随机结构进行更精细的概率分析，例如网络中的节点度数分布或缓存命中率评估。

en.tldr: This paper revisits the random allocation of n balls into N boxes, focusing on the proportion of boxes containing exactly r balls, and provides asymptotic results with explicit two-sided bounds for remainder terms.
en.motivation: Classical asymptotic results for expectations, variances, and covariances of box proportions in random allocation models require weaker assumptions and more precise control of remainder terms.
en.method: Reformulate classical asymptotic results through the size distribution of a randomly chosen box and derive explicit two-sided bounds for associated remainder terms under relaxed assumptions.
en.result: Obtain asymptotic expressions for box proportion statistics under weaker conditions and provide explicit remainder bounds, improving existing theoretical results.
en.help_to_user: Provides more precise mathematical tools and theoretical guarantees for probability analysis of random allocation problems, applicable to scenarios requiring evaluation of distribution uniformity.

idea_spark.idea: Transform the box proportion problem into the size distribution of a randomly chosen box to unify asymptotic analysis and derive tighter error bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results rely on asymptotic assumptions and may require additional numerical verification or correction for finite samples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires more refined probabilistic analysis of discrete random structures, such as node degree distributions in networks or cache hit rate evaluation.

papers.title: Data Synthesis Improves 3D Myotube Instance Segmentation
papers.summary: Myotubes are multinucleated muscle fibers serving as key model systems for studying muscle physiology, disease mechanisms, and drug responses. Mechanistic studies and drug screening thereby rely on quantitative morphological readouts such as diameter, length, and branching degree, which in turn require precise three-dimensional instance segmentation. Yet established pretrained biomedical segmentation models fail to generalize to this domain due to the absence of large annotated myotube datasets. We introduce a geometry-driven synthesis pipeline that models individual myotubes via polynomial centerlines, locally varying radii, branching structures, and ellipsoidal end caps derived from real microscopy observations. Synthetic volumes are rendered with realistic noise, optical artifacts, and CycleGAN-based Domain Adaptation (DA). A compact 3D U-Net with self-supervised encoder pretraining, trained exclusively on synthetic data, achieves a mean IPQ of 0.22 on real data, significantly outperforming three established zero-shot segmentation models, demonstrating that biophysics-driven synthesis enables effective instance segmentation in annotation-scarce biomedical domains.

ai.tldr: 提出一种几何驱动的合成流水线，生成逼真的3D肌管数据，并训练一个紧凑的3D U-Net模型，在真实数据上实现了优于零样本分割模型的性能，解决了标注稀缺生物医学领域的实例分割问题。
ai.motivation: 肌管是研究肌肉生理学、疾病机制和药物反应的关键模型系统，定量形态学分析需要精确的3D实例分割。由于缺乏大规模标注数据集，现有的预训练生物医学分割模型无法泛化到该领域。
ai.method: 1. 基于真实显微镜观察，使用多项式中心线、局部变化半径、分支结构和椭球端帽对单个肌管进行几何建模。2. 合成体积数据时加入真实噪声和光学伪影，并应用CycleGAN进行域适应。3. 使用纯合成数据训练一个具有自监督编码器预训练的紧凑3D U-Net。
ai.result: 仅在合成数据上训练的模型在真实数据上达到了0.22的平均IPQ，显著优于三种已建立的零样本分割模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为标注稀缺的生物医学3D实例分割任务提供了一种有效的合成数据生成和训练框架，可推广到其他类似结构（如神经元、血管）的分析中。

idea_spark.idea: 将生物物理知识（如中心线、半径变化、分支结构）编码到合成数据生成中，以提高模型对真实复杂结构的泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据的逼真度高度依赖于几何建模的准确性和域适应效果，可能无法完全捕捉真实数据的所有变异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 对于其他具有明确几何或拓扑结构的生物医学对象（如血管网络、神经元树突），可类似地设计基于物理规则的合成流水线。

en.tldr: Proposes a geometry-driven synthesis pipeline to generate realistic 3D myotube data and trains a compact 3D U-Net, achieving superior performance on real data compared to zero-shot segmentation models, addressing instance segmentation in annotation-scarce biomedical domains.
en.motivation: Myotubes are key model systems for studying muscle physiology, disease mechanisms, and drug responses. Quantitative morphological analysis requires precise 3D instance segmentation. Established pretrained biomedical segmentation models fail to generalize due to the absence of large annotated datasets.
en.method: 1. Model individual myotubes geometrically using polynomial centerlines, locally varying radii, branching structures, and ellipsoidal end caps derived from real microscopy observations. 2. Render synthetic volumes with realistic noise, optical artifacts, and CycleGAN-based Domain Adaptation. 3. Train a compact 3D U-Net with self-supervised encoder pretraining exclusively on synthetic data.
en.result: The model trained solely on synthetic data achieves a mean IPQ of 0.22 on real data, significantly outperforming three established zero-shot segmentation models.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective synthetic data generation and training framework for 3D instance segmentation in annotation-scarce biomedical tasks, potentially generalizable to other similar structures (e.g., neurons, blood vessels).

idea_spark.idea: Encode biophysical knowledge (e.g., centerlines, radius variations, branching structures) into synthetic data generation to improve model generalization to real complex structures.
idea_spark.risk: The realism of synthetic data heavily depends on the accuracy of geometric modeling and the effectiveness of domain adaptation, potentially failing to capture all variations in real data.
idea_spark.inspiration: For other biomedical objects with clear geometric or topological structures (e.g., vascular networks, neuronal dendrites), similar physics-rule-based synthesis pipelines could be designed.

papers.title: On-Line Policy Iteration with Trajectory-Driven Policy Generation
papers.summary: We consider deterministic finite-horizon optimal control problems with a fixed initial state. We introduce an on-line policy iteration method, which starting from a given policy, however obtained, generates a sequence of cost improving policies and corresponding trajectories. Each policy produces a trajectory, which is used in turn to generate data for training the next policy. The method is motivated by problems that are repeatedly solved starting from the same initial state, including discrete optimization and path planning for repetitive tasks. For such problems, the method is fast enough to be used on-line. Under a natural consistency condition, we show that the sequence of costs of the generated policies is monotonically improving for the given initial state (but not necessarily for other states). We illustrate our results with computational studies from combinatorial optimization and 3-dimensional path planning for drones in the presence of obstacles. We also discuss briefly a stochastic counterpart of our algorithm. Our proposed framework combines elements of rollout and policy iteration with flexible trajectory-based policy representations, and applies to problems involving a single as well as multiple decision makers. It also provides a principled way to train neural network-based policies using trajectory data, while preserving monotonic cost improvement.

ai.tldr: 提出一种在线策略迭代方法，从固定初始状态出发，利用轨迹数据迭代生成成本单调下降的策略，适用于重复求解的优化与路径规划问题。
ai.motivation: 针对需要从相同初始状态重复求解的问题（如离散优化、重复任务路径规划），需要一种快速在线方法，在保证成本单调改进的前提下训练策略。
ai.method: 从给定策略出发，生成轨迹；利用轨迹数据训练下一个策略；循环迭代。结合了rollout与策略迭代思想，支持神经网络等灵活策略表示。
ai.result: 在满足一致性条件下，生成策略序列对给定初始状态的成本单调下降；计算实验验证了在组合优化与无人机三维路径规划中的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为重复初始状态的优化问题提供了一种保证单调改进的在线策略迭代框架，可结合神经网络训练，适用于单/多智能体问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将在线策略迭代与轨迹数据重用结合，为重复任务提供快速单调改进的求解框架
idea_spark.risk: 单调改进仅对给定初始状态成立，泛化性可能受限；一致性条件需满足
idea_spark.inspiration: 可扩展至随机环境、多初始状态泛化、与其他策略表示结合

idea_spark.risk: 单调改进仅对给定初始状态成立，泛化性可能受限；一致性条件需满足
idea_spark.inspiration: 可扩展至随机环境、多初始状态泛化、与其他策略表示结合

en.tldr: Proposes an on-line policy iteration method that starts from a fixed initial state and iteratively generates policies with monotonically improving cost using trajectory data, suitable for repeatedly solved optimization and path planning problems.
en.motivation: For problems that are repeatedly solved from the same initial state (e.g., discrete optimization, repetitive path planning), a fast on-line method is needed to train policies while guaranteeing monotonic cost improvement.
en.method: Start from a given policy, generate a trajectory; use trajectory data to train the next policy; iterate. Combines rollout and policy iteration, supports flexible policy representations like neural networks.
en.result: Under a natural consistency condition, the sequence of policies yields monotonically improving costs for the given initial state; computational studies in combinatorial optimization and 3D drone path planning demonstrate effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Provides an on-line policy iteration framework with guaranteed monotonic improvement for problems with repeated initial states, compatible with neural network training and applicable to single/multi-agent settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine on-line policy iteration with trajectory data reuse to enable fast monotonic improvement for repetitive tasks
idea_spark.risk: Monotonic improvement only guaranteed for the given initial state; generalization may be limited; consistency condition required
idea_spark.inspiration: Extend to stochastic settings, generalize to multiple initial states, integrate with other policy representations

papers.title: NOMAI : A real-time photometric classifier for superluminous supernovae identification. A science module for the Fink broker
papers.summary: Superluminous supernovae (SLSNe) are one of the most luminous stellar explosions known, yet they remain poorly understood. Because they are intrinsically rare, efficiently identifying them in the large alert streams produced by modern time-domain surveys is essential for enabling spectroscopic follow-up. We present NOMAI, a machine learning classifier designed to identify SLSN candidates directly from photometric alerts in the ZTF stream, using light curves accumulated over at least 30 days. It does not require any spectroscopic redshift and is running in real time within the Fink broker. ZTF light curves are transformed into a set of physically motivated features derived primarily from model-fitting procedures using SALT2 and Rainbow, a blackbody-based multi-band fitting framework. These features are used to train an XGBoost classifier on a curated dataset of labeled ZTF sources constructed using literature samples of SLSNe, along with TNS and internal ZTF labeled sources. The final training dataset contains 5280 unique sources, including 225 spectroscopically classified SLSNe. On the training sample, the classifier reaches 66% completeness and 58% purity. Deployed within the Fink broker, NOMAI has been running continuously since 18/12/2025 on the ZTF alert stream and publicly reports SLSN candidates every night by automatically posting them to dedicated communication channels. Based on this, we also report the first two-month as an evaluation period, where the classifier successfully recovered 22 of the 24 active SLSNe reported on the Transient Name Server. The achieved performances demonstrate that the classifier provides a valuable tool for experts to efficiently scan the alert stream and identify promising candidates. In the near future, NOMAI is intended to be adapted to operate on the Legacy Survey of Space and Time conducted by the Vera C. Rubin Observatory.

ai.tldr: NOMAI是一个实时光度分类器，用于从ZTF警报流中识别超亮超新星候选体，无需光谱红移，在Fink代理中运行。
ai.motivation: 超亮超新星极其罕见且光度极高，但理解不足。从现代时域巡天产生的大量警报流中高效识别它们，对于后续光谱观测至关重要。
ai.method: 将ZTF光曲线转换为基于SALT2和Rainbow模型拟合的物理特征，使用包含5280个标记源（含225个光谱分类超亮超新星）的数据集训练XGBoost分类器。
ai.result: 在训练样本上达到66%完备性和58%纯度。部署后，在两个月评估期内成功恢复了24个已报告超亮超新星中的22个。
ai.help_to_user: 为专家提供高效扫描警报流、识别有希望候选体的工具，未来计划适配维拉·鲁宾天文台的时空遗产巡天。

en.tldr: NOMAI is a real-time photometric classifier for identifying superluminous supernova candidates directly from ZTF alert streams without spectroscopic redshift, running within the Fink broker.
en.motivation: Superluminous supernovae are intrinsically rare and extremely luminous but poorly understood. Efficiently identifying them in large alert streams from modern time-domain surveys is essential for spectroscopic follow-up.
en.method: Transform ZTF light curves into physically motivated features derived from SALT2 and Rainbow model-fitting. Train an XGBoost classifier on a curated dataset of 5280 labeled sources, including 225 spectroscopically classified SLSNe.

idea_spark.risk: Dependent on specific survey data formats and models; adaptation to other instruments requires adjustments
idea_spark.inspiration: Integration of real-time machine learning systems with astronomical data streams for automated discovery and reporting of rare events

papers.title: A Nonasymptotic Theory of Gain-Dependent Error Dynamics in Behavior Cloning
papers.summary: Behavior cloning (BC) policies on position-controlled robots inherit the closed-loop response of the underlying PD controller, yet the effect of controller gains on BC failure lacks a nonasymptotic theory. We show that independent sub-Gaussian action errors propagate through the gain-dependent closed-loop dynamics to yield sub-Gaussian position errors whose proxy matrix $X_\infty(K)$ governs the failure tail. The probability of horizon-$T$ task failure factorizes into a gain-dependent amplification index $Γ_T(K)$ and the validation loss plus a generalization slack, so training loss alone cannot predict closed-loop performance. Under shape-preserving upper-bound structural assumptions the proxy admits the scalar bound $X_\infty(K)\preceqΨ(K)\bar X$ with $Ψ(K)$ decomposed into label difficulty, injection strength, and contraction, ranking the four canonical regimes with compliant-overdamped (CO) tightest, stiff-underdamped (SU) loosest, and the stiff-overdamped versus compliant-underdamped ordering system-dependent. For the canonical scalar second-order PD system the closed-form continuous-time stationary variance $X_\infty^{\mathrm{c}}(α,β)=σ^2α/(2β)$ is strictly monotone in stiffness and damping over the entire stable orthant, covering both underdamped and overdamped regimes, and the exact zero-order-hold (ZOH) discretization inherits this monotonicity. The analysis provides the first nonasymptotic explanation of the empirical finding that compliant, overdamped controllers improve BC success rates.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了行为克隆在PD控制器下增益依赖误差动力学的非渐近理论，揭示了控制器增益如何通过闭环动力学放大动作误差，影响任务失败概率。
ai.motivation: 行为克隆策略在位置控制机器人上继承了底层PD控制器的闭环响应，但控制器增益对BC失败的影响缺乏非渐近理论解释。
ai.method: 通过分析独立次高斯动作误差在增益依赖闭环动力学中的传播，推导出位置误差的代理矩阵X∞(K)，并将任务失败概率分解为增益依赖放大指数Γ_T(K)与验证损失及泛化间隙之和。
ai.result: 证明了平稳方差X∞^c(α,β)=σ²α/(2β)在整个稳定象限内随刚度和阻尼严格单调，且零阶保持离散化继承该单调性，首次非渐近解释了顺从过阻尼控制器提升BC成功率的现象。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器人行为克隆的控制器调参提供了理论依据，表明训练损失 alone 不能预测闭环性能，需考虑增益依赖的误差放大。

idea_spark.idea: 将控制器增益作为可学习参数融入BC训练过程，以直接优化闭环性能。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如形状保持上界结构）在实际复杂动力学中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在模仿学习中显式建模控制器动力学，而非仅学习动作映射。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a nonasymptotic theory of gain-dependent error dynamics in behavior cloning under PD control, revealing how controller gains amplify action errors through closed-loop dynamics to affect task failure probability.
en.motivation: Behavior cloning policies on position-controlled robots inherit the closed-loop response of the underlying PD controller, yet the effect of controller gains on BC failure lacks a nonasymptotic theoretical explanation.
en.method: By analyzing the propagation of independent sub-Gaussian action errors through gain-dependent closed-loop dynamics, a proxy matrix X∞(K) for position errors is derived. The probability of horizon-T task failure is factorized into a gain-dependent amplification index Γ_T(K) and the validation loss plus a generalization slack.
en.result: The closed-form continuous-time stationary variance X∞^c(α,β)=σ²α/(2β) is proven strictly monotone in stiffness and damping over the entire stable orthant, with exact ZOH discretization inheriting this monotonicity, providing the first nonasymptotic explanation for the empirical finding that compliant, overdamped controllers improve BC success rates.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for controller gain tuning in robotic behavior cloning, showing that training loss alone cannot predict closed-loop performance due to gain-dependent error amplification.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate controller gains as learnable parameters within BC training to directly optimize closed-loop performance.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., shape-preserving upper-bound structure) may not hold in real-world complex dynamics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires explicitly modeling controller dynamics in imitation learning rather than merely learning action mappings.

papers.title: Quantitative Stability of Many-Marginal Schrodinger Bridge
papers.summary: In this paper, we explore quantitative stability of multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges with respect to the marginal constraints. We focus on the case where the number of marginal constraints is large (i.e. ``many-marginals"). When this number increases, we show that the Kullback--Leibler (KL) divergence between two multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges, as measures on the path space, can be asymptotically bounded by the terminal marginal KL divergence and a time-integrated squared discrepancy {that combines} Wasserstein-2 geodesic velocity fields with a log-density gradient term. Our stability upper bound is also asymptotically tight: it converges to zero as the number of marginal constraints increases with unperturbed marginal constraints. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first such stability result that addresses the many-marginal regime, giving error estimates that are asymptotically independent of the number of marginals.   To achieve our result, the key step is to derive an asymptotic expansion (of order $k\ge 2$) of Schrödinger potentials with respect to a diminishing regularization coefficient. This result can also be applied to deriving asymptotic expansions of entropic Brenier maps in entropic optimal self-transport problems. As byproducts of our analyses, we also establish the asymptotic expansion of entropic optimal transport cost with respect to the diminishing regularization coefficient when two marginal constraints are sufficiently close. We also prove a stability property of the Schrödinger functional.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了多边际薛定谔桥关于边际约束的定量稳定性，重点关注边际数量很大的情况。
ai.motivation: 多边际薛定谔桥在概率建模和最优传输中有广泛应用，但边际数量很大时其稳定性缺乏理论分析。
ai.method: 通过推导薛定谔势关于递减正则化系数的渐近展开，结合Wasserstein-2测地速度场和对数密度梯度项，建立KL散度的上界估计。
ai.result: 证明了当边际约束数量增加时，两个多边际薛定谔桥之间的KL散度渐近有界，且该上界渐近紧致。
ai.help_to_user: 为多边际薛定谔桥的稳定性提供了首个定量分析框架，误差估计与边际数量渐近无关。

idea_spark.idea: 利用正则化系数的渐近分析处理高维边际约束的稳定性
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果需要边际约束足够接近的假设条件
idea_spark.inspiration: 为大规模概率耦合的鲁棒性分析提供了新工具

en.tldr: This paper studies quantitative stability of multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges with respect to marginal constraints, focusing on the many-marginals regime.
en.motivation: Multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges have broad applications in probability modeling and optimal transport, but their stability in the many-marginals regime lacks theoretical analysis.
en.method: By deriving asymptotic expansions of Schrödinger potentials with respect to a diminishing regularization coefficient, combined with Wasserstein-2 geodesic velocity fields and log-density gradient terms, we establish upper bounds for KL divergence.
en.result: We prove that as the number of marginal constraints increases, the KL divergence between two multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges is asymptotically bounded, and this bound is asymptotically tight.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first quantitative stability framework for multi-marginal Schrödinger bridges with error estimates asymptotically independent of the number of marginals.

idea_spark.idea: Using asymptotic analysis of regularization coefficients to handle stability with high-dimensional marginal constraints
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results require assumptions about sufficiently close marginal constraints
idea_spark.inspiration: Offers new tools for robustness analysis of large-scale probability couplings

papers.title: A Noise Tolerant SQP Algorithm for Inequality Constrained Optimization
papers.summary: We propose a sequential quadratic programming (SQP) algorithm for inequality constrained optimization that is robust to the presence of bounded noise in function and derivative evaluations. We cover the case where constraint evaluations contain noise as well as the objective. The proposed algorithm is a line search SQP method with relaxations to deal with noise. We study the effect of noise on the global convergence behavior of the algorithm. We implement the algorithm with noise-aware quasi-Newton updates, and numerically observe that the algorithm can achieve accuracy proportional to the noise level and problem-dependent parameters, as suggested by the theory.

ai.tldr: 提出一种对函数和导数评估中的有界噪声具有鲁棒性的序列二次规划算法，用于不等式约束优化。
ai.motivation: 实际优化问题中，函数和导数评估常受噪声影响，现有SQP算法对此缺乏鲁棒性。
ai.method: 采用带松弛的线搜索SQP方法，结合噪声感知拟牛顿更新，处理目标和约束评估中的噪声。
ai.result: 算法在噪声影响下保持全局收敛，数值精度与噪声水平及问题相关参数成比例。
ai.help_to_user: 为受噪声污染的工程优化问题提供稳定求解工具。

idea_spark.idea: 在步长接受条件中引入噪声容限，放松精确性要求。
idea_spark.risk: 过度松弛可能导致收敛到非真实解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似噪声处理思想用于随机优化或鲁棒控制。

en.tldr: Proposes a sequential quadratic programming algorithm robust to bounded noise in function and derivative evaluations for inequality constrained optimization.
en.motivation: Real-world optimization often involves noisy evaluations, for which existing SQP methods lack robustness.
en.method: A line search SQP method with relaxations and noise-aware quasi-Newton updates to handle noise in both objective and constraint evaluations.
en.result: The algorithm maintains global convergence under noise, achieving accuracy proportional to noise level and problem-dependent parameters.
en.help_to_user: Provides a stable solver for engineering optimization problems contaminated by noise.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce noise tolerance in step acceptance conditions, relaxing exactness requirements.
idea_spark.risk: Excessive relaxation may lead to convergence to non-genuine solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying similar noise-handling ideas to stochastic optimization or robust control.

papers.title: Empirical Evaluation of Policy-Based Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Service Control in an M/M/1 Queue
papers.summary: While reinforcement learning has been increasingly applied to stochastic control, few studies have systematically examined policy-based methods in queuing environments modeled as a semi-Markov decision process (SMDP). To address this gap, we investigate how policy-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms perform when applied to the control of service rates in an M/M/1 queue, a common queuing model for manufacturing, computing, and service systems. The problem is formulated as an SMDP in which decisions occur at each new service, allowing an agent to select different service rates from a finite set of speeds, aiming to minimize an objective function that manages system congestion and energy costs. Three policy-based reinforcement learning algorithms, namely REINFORCE, Actor-Critic (A2C), and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), are trained in a simulated environment using two state representations: the instantaneous queue length and an augmented state that includes a one-step queue history. Performance is evaluated in terms of convergence speed, sampling efficiency, policy quality, and pseudo-regret relative to the steady-state optimum.

ai.tldr: 本文实证评估了三种基于策略的强化学习算法（REINFORCE、A2C、PPO）在M/M/1队列服务速率动态控制问题中的性能。
ai.motivation: 强化学习在随机控制中的应用日益增多，但很少有研究系统性地检验基于策略的方法在半马尔可夫决策过程建模的排队环境中的表现。
ai.method: 将M/M/1队列服务控制问题建模为半马尔可夫决策过程，在模拟环境中训练三种策略算法，使用瞬时队列长度和包含一步历史信息的增强状态两种状态表示。
ai.result: 从收敛速度、采样效率、策略质量以及与稳态最优解的伪遗憾等方面评估了算法性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为在排队系统中应用基于策略的强化学习提供了实证基准和性能比较。

idea_spark.idea: 在排队控制SMDP中引入历史状态信息可能提升策略学习效果。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟环境与真实系统可能存在差异，算法在更复杂队列模型中的泛化能力未验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可将该方法扩展到多服务器队列、具有优先级或放弃行为的排队网络等更复杂的服务系统。

zh.tldr: 本文实证评估了三种基于策略的强化学习算法（REINFORCE、A2C、PPO）在M/M/1队列服务速率动态控制问题中的性能。
zh.motivation: 强化学习在随机控制中的应用日益增多，但很少有研究系统性地检验基于策略的方法在半马尔可夫决策过程建模的排队环境中的表现。
zh.method: 将M/M/1队列服务控制问题建模为半马尔可夫决策过程，在模拟环境中训练三种策略算法，使用瞬时队列长度和包含一步历史信息的增强状态两种状态表示。
zh.result: 从收敛速度、采样效率、策略质量以及与稳态最优解的伪遗憾等方面评估了算法性能。
zh.help_to_user: 为在排队系统中应用基于策略的强化学习提供了实证基准和性能比较。

idea_spark.idea: 在排队控制SMDP中引入历史状态信息可能提升策略学习效果。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟环境与真实系统可能存在差异，算法在更复杂队列模型中的泛化能力未验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可将该方法扩展到多服务器队列、具有优先级或放弃行为的排队网络等更复杂的服务系统。

en.tldr: This paper empirically evaluates three policy-based reinforcement learning algorithms (REINFORCE, A2C, PPO) for dynamic service rate control in an M/M/1 queue.
en.motivation: While reinforcement learning has been increasingly applied to stochastic control, few studies have systematically examined policy-based methods in queuing environments modeled as a semi-Markov decision process.
en.method: Formulates M/M/1 queue service control as an SMDP, trains three policy algorithms in simulation using two state representations: instantaneous queue length and an augmented state with one-step history.
en.result: Evaluates algorithm performance in terms of convergence speed, sampling efficiency, policy quality, and pseudo-regret relative to the steady-state optimum.
en.help_to_user: Provides an empirical benchmark and performance comparison for applying policy-based RL in queueing systems.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating historical state information may improve policy learning in queue control SMDPs.
idea_spark.risk: Discrepancy between simulation and real systems; generalization to more complex queue models not verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could extend to multi-server queues, queueing networks with priorities or abandonment behavior, and other complex service systems.

papers.title: CoCoDiff: Optimizing Collective Communications for Distributed Diffusion Transformer Inference Under Ulysses Sequence Parallelism
papers.summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) are increasingly adopted in scientific computing, yet growing model sizes and resolutions make distributed multi-GPU inference essential. Ulysses sequence parallelism scales DiT inference but introduces frequent all-to-all collectives that dominate latency. Overlapping these with computation is difficult due to tight data dependencies, large message volumes, and asymmetric interconnect bandwidths.   We introduce CoCoDiff, a distributed DiT inference engine exploiting two observations: (1) V requires only linear projection while Q/K need additional normalization and RoPE, creating opportunities to overlap V's communication with Q/K computation; (2) adjacent denoising steps produce similar tensors, yielding temporal redundancy. CoCoDiff introduces three mechanisms: Tile-Aware Parallel All-to-all (TAPA) decomposes collectives into topology-aligned phases; V-First scheduling hides V's communication behind Q/K computation; and V-Major selective communication transmits only active projections on slow interconnects. On the Aurora supercomputer with four DiT models across 1-8 nodes (up to 96 Intel GPU tiles), CoCoDiff achieves an average speedup of 3.6x, peaking at 8.4x.

ai.tldr: CoCoDiff是一个分布式扩散Transformer推理引擎，通过优化Ulysses序列并行中的集体通信，实现了最高8.4倍的推理加速。
ai.motivation: 扩散Transformer模型规模和分辨率不断增长，需要分布式多GPU推理。Ulysses序列并行虽然能扩展推理规模，但引入了频繁的all-to-all集体通信，这些通信成为延迟的主要瓶颈。
ai.method: 基于两个关键观察：(1)V仅需线性投影而Q/K需要额外计算，可重叠V通信与Q/K计算；(2)相邻去噪步骤产生相似张量，存在时间冗余。提出三种机制：TAPA将集体通信分解为拓扑对齐阶段；V-First调度将V通信隐藏在Q/K计算后；V-Major选择性通信仅在慢速互连上传输活跃投影。
ai.result: 在Aurora超级计算机上，使用1-8个节点（最多96个Intel GPU tile）测试四个DiT模型，平均加速比达到3.6倍，峰值加速比达到8.4倍。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模扩散Transformer推理提供了高效的通信优化方案，显著降低分布式推理延迟。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Transformer注意力机制中不同矩阵的计算复杂度差异，设计非对称通信调度；利用序列生成任务的时间局部性，减少冗余通信。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于特定的模型计算模式（Q/K/V处理差异），对非Transformer架构可能不适用；时间冗余假设在高度动态的场景中可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将模型计算特性与系统拓扑特性结合进行协同优化；将应用语义（如扩散过程的时间连续性）转化为系统优化机会。

en.tldr: CoCoDiff is a distributed Diffusion Transformer inference engine that optimizes collective communications under Ulysses sequence parallelism, achieving up to 8.4x speedup.
en.motivation: Growing Diffusion Transformer model sizes and resolutions necessitate distributed multi-GPU inference. Ulysses sequence parallelism scales DiT inference but introduces frequent all-to-all collectives that dominate latency.
en.method: Exploits two observations: (1) V requires only linear projection while Q/K need additional computation, enabling overlap of V communication with Q/K computation; (2) adjacent denoising steps produce similar tensors, yielding temporal redundancy. Introduces three mechanisms: Tile-Aware Parallel All-to-all (TAPA) decomposes collectives into topology-aligned phases; V-First scheduling hides V communication behind Q/K computation; and V-Major selective communication transmits only active projections on slow interconnects.
en.result: On the Aurora supercomputer with four DiT models across 1-8 nodes (up to 96 Intel GPU tiles), CoCoDiff achieves an average speedup of 3.6x, peaking at 8.4x.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient communication optimization solution for large-scale Diffusion Transformer inference, significantly reducing distributed inference latency.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage computational complexity differences among attention matrices (Q/K/V) to design asymmetric communication scheduling; exploit temporal locality in sequence generation tasks to reduce redundant communication.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on specific model computation patterns (Q/K/V processing differences), may not apply to non-Transformer architectures; temporal redundancy assumption may fail in highly dynamic scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Co-optimize model computational characteristics with system topology properties; translate application semantics (e.g., temporal continuity in diffusion processes) into system optimization opportunities.

papers.title: Correlators in $T\bar{T}$ and Root-$T\bar{T}$ Deformed CFTs
papers.summary: Quasi-primary correlators in two-dimensional conformal field theories deformed simultaneously by $T\bar T$ and root-$T\bar T$ are studied. A path-integral formulation motivated by the geometric realization of the combined deformation is used to develop a geometric framework for evaluating the deformed correlators. Within this framework, the two-point function is obtained to all orders in the $T\bar T$ coupling and to leading order in the root-$T\bar T$ coupling, while the leading correction to the three-point function is computed. It is further shown that the deformed two-point correlator admits a kernel representation as a weighted average of undeformed CFT correlators over conformal dimensions. This representation is derived explicitly for both the pure $T\bar T$ deformation and the combined flow. In this way, the mixed $T\bar T$/root-$T\bar T$ deformation is incorporated into the geometric description of irrelevant deformations, and the structure of local correlators beyond the pure $T\bar T$ case is characterized more explicitly.

ai.tldr: 研究了二维共形场论中同时受$T\bar{T}$和根号$T\bar{T}$变形的准原初关联函数。通过基于几何实现的路径积分公式，建立了计算变形关联函数的几何框架，得到了两点函数在所有$T\bar{T}$耦合阶和根号$T\bar{T}$耦合领头阶的表达式，并计算了三点的领头修正。
ai.motivation: $T\bar{T}$变形是二维共形场论中一种重要的无关变形，而根号$T\bar{T}$变形是其推广。理解这两种变形同时作用下的关联函数结构，有助于刻画超出纯$T\bar{T}$情形的局部关联子特性，并将混合变形纳入无关变形的几何描述中。
ai.method: 采用由组合变形几何实现所启发的路径积分表述，发展了一个用于计算变形关联函数的几何框架。在该框架内，通过系统展开和积分技术，求解了变形后的关联函数方程。
ai.result: 得到了两点函数在所有$T\bar{T}$耦合阶和根号$T\bar{T}$耦合领头阶的精确表达式；计算了三点的领头修正；证明了变形两点关联函数可表示为未变形CFT关联函数在共形维数上的加权平均的核表示，并针对纯$T\bar{T}$变形和组合流导出了显式表达式。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为同时受$T\bar{T}$和根号$T\bar{T}$变形的二维CFT中的关联函数计算提供了系统的几何框架和具体结果，将混合变形纳入了无关变形的几何描述体系。

idea_spark.idea: 利用变形关联函数的核表示（作为未变形关联函数的加权平均），或许可以构造出新的可解变形模型，或研究变形理论的热力学与纠缠性质。
idea_spark.risk: 目前结果仅限于两点函数的全阶和三点函数的领头阶，更高点函数或高阶修正的计算可能涉及更复杂的几何与解析技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 几何框架与核表示揭示了无关变形下关联函数的结构共性，暗示可能存在更普遍的变形分类与统一描述。

en.tldr: Quasi-primary correlators in two-dimensional conformal field theories deformed simultaneously by $T\bar T$ and root-$T\bar T$ are studied. A geometric framework based on a path-integral formulation motivated by the geometric realization of the combined deformation is developed to compute the deformed correlators. The two-point function is obtained to all orders in the $T\bar T$ coupling and to leading order in the root-$T\bar T$ coupling, and the leading correction to the three-point function is computed.
en.motivation: The $T\bar{T}$ deformation is an important irrelevant deformation in two-dimensional CFTs, and the root-$T\bar{T}$ deformation is its generalization. Understanding the structure of correlators under the simultaneous action of both deformations helps characterize local correlators beyond the pure $T\bar{T}$ case and incorporates the mixed deformation into the geometric description of irrelevant deformations.
en.method: A path-integral formulation motivated by the geometric realization of the combined deformation is employed to develop a geometric framework for evaluating the deformed correlators. Within this framework, equations for the deformed correlators are solved via systematic expansion and integration techniques.
en.result: The two-point function is obtained exactly to all orders in the $T\bar T$ coupling and to leading order in the root-$T\bar T$ coupling; the leading correction to the three-point function is computed; it is shown that the deformed two-point correlator admits a kernel representation as a weighted average of undeformed CFT correlators over conformal dimensions, with explicit expressions derived for both the pure $T\bar T$ deformation and the combined flow.
en.help_to_user: This work provides a systematic geometric framework and concrete results for computing correlators in 2D CFTs deformed simultaneously by $T\bar T$ and root-$T\bar T$, incorporating the mixed deformation into the geometric description of irrelevant deformations.

idea_spark.idea: The kernel representation of deformed correlators as weighted averages of undeformed ones could potentially be used to construct new solvable deformation models or to study thermodynamic and entanglement properties of deformed theories.
idea_spark.risk: Current results are limited to the two-point function to all orders and the three-point function to leading order; computing higher-point functions or higher-order corrections may involve more complex geometric and analytic techniques.
idea_spark.inspiration: The geometric framework and kernel representation reveal structural commonalities of correlators under irrelevant deformations, suggesting the possibility of a more general classification and unified description of deformations.

papers.title: Duality attainment and strict feasibility of the generalized moment problem and its relaxations
papers.summary: The generalized moment problem (GMP) is an infinite dimensional linear problem over the cone of finite nonnegative Borel measures. When a GMP instance involves finitely many polynomial moment constraints, moment/sum-of-squares hierarchies provide a sequence of bounds converging to the optimal value. We consider GMP instances with measures supported over a compact basic semialgebraic set $X$. We study the case when $X$ has nonempty interior, and the case when $X$ is the vanishing set of prescribed polynomials forming a Gröbner basis of the ideal they generate, which we assume is real radical. Under a relative interior assumption, we show attainment of the infinite dimensional dual problem, and attainment of each associated finite dimensional sum-of-squares strengthening. For the latter we present two disjoint proofs. The first is obtained by adapting results regarding the closedness of quadratic modules, and the second builds on Csiszár's work on exponential density constructions to find a strictly feasible measure. Finally, we discuss the special case where $X$ is the product of spheres, and applications of our results to GMP instances arising from tensor optimization and quantum information theory.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了广义矩问题及其松弛的严格可行性与对偶可达性，针对紧基本半代数集上的测度，在相对内部假设下证明了无限维对偶问题及有限维SOS强化的可达性。
ai.motivation: 广义矩问题是无限维线性问题，当涉及有限多项式矩约束时，矩/SOS层次结构提供收敛于最优值的序列边界。然而，对偶可达性与严格可行性的理论保证尚不完善。
ai.method: 考虑测度支撑在紧基本半代数集X上，分两种情况：X有非空内部，或X是由形成实根理想的Gröbner基多项式定义的零点集。在相对内部假设下，通过闭二次模结果或Csiszár指数密度构造严格可行测度两种独立证明。
ai.result: 证明了无限维对偶问题的可达性，以及每个有限维SOS强化的可达性。特别讨论了X为球面乘积的情形，并应用于张量优化与量子信息论中的GMP实例。
ai.help_to_user: 为涉及多项式矩约束的广义矩问题提供了严格可行性与对偶可达性的理论保证，支持矩/SOS层次结构的可靠应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将实代数几何工具（Gröbner基、实根理想）与优化对偶理论结合，为矩问题建立可行性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖紧支撑集与相对内部假设，非紧或边界情形可能不适用；实根理想假设可能限制应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将代数几何工具系统应用于优化问题的可行性分析；为张量优化与量子信息中的矩问题提供理论基石。

en.tldr: This paper studies strict feasibility and duality attainment for the generalized moment problem and its relaxations, proving attainment of the infinite-dimensional dual and each finite-dimensional SOS strengthening under a relative interior assumption for measures supported on compact basic semialgebraic sets.
en.motivation: The generalized moment problem is an infinite-dimensional linear problem over measures; moment/SOS hierarchies provide converging bounds for polynomial moment constraints, but theoretical guarantees for duality attainment and strict feasibility remain incomplete.
en.method: Considers GMP instances with measures supported on a compact basic semialgebraic set X. Two cases: X has nonempty interior, or X is the vanishing set of polynomials forming a Gröbner basis of a real radical ideal. Under a relative interior assumption, provides two disjoint proofs: adapting closed quadratic module results, and constructing strictly feasible measures via Csiszár's exponential density method.
en.result: Shows attainment of the infinite-dimensional dual problem and each associated finite-dimensional SOS strengthening. Discusses special case where X is a product of spheres, with applications to GMP instances from tensor optimization and quantum information theory.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for strict feasibility and duality attainment in generalized moment problems with polynomial moment constraints, supporting reliable application of moment/SOS hierarchies.

idea_spark.idea: Combine real algebraic geometry tools (Gröbner basis, real radical ideals) with optimization duality theory to establish feasibility conditions for moment problems.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on compact support and relative interior assumptions; may not apply to non-compact or boundary cases. Real radical ideal assumption may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic application of algebraic geometry tools to feasibility analysis in optimization; provides theoretical foundation for moment problems in tensor optimization and quantum information.

papers.title: PANOC-lite: A simpler and more efficient algorithm for composite minimization
papers.summary: This work introduces a simple and efficient linesearch method for composite minimization that accelerates proximal-gradient iterations with fast Newton-type directions. Our algorithm is based on simple operations and only requires the standard proximal-gradient oracle, similar to PANOC and ZeroFPR, provided that the nonsmooth term is convex. Noteworthy improvements include a cheaper backtracking procedure, in the sense that no additional gradients need to be evaluated, and an enlarged range of permitted stepsizes. Global subsequential convergence and local superlinear convergence are established under conventional assumptions by considering a novel merit function which is less expensive to evaluate than alternatives like the forward-backward envelope. Finally, the proposed approach is validated on model predictive control problems with collision avoidance constraints, as well as on the LIBSVM and CUTEst benchmarks.

ai.tldr: PANOC-lite是一种用于复合最小化的新型线搜索算法，它通过牛顿型方向加速近端梯度迭代，计算更简单且步长范围更大。
ai.motivation: 现有复合最小化算法（如PANOC和ZeroFPR）需要额外的梯度计算或昂贵的评价函数，限制了效率。
ai.method: 提出基于标准近端梯度预言机的线搜索方法，采用更廉价的回溯过程（无需额外梯度计算）并扩大允许步长范围。
ai.result: 在常规假设下建立了全局子序列收敛和局部超线性收敛，并在模型预测控制与基准测试中验证了性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有凸非光滑项的复合优化问题提供了更简单高效的求解器，适用于实时控制与大规模基准问题。

idea_spark.idea: 设计评价成本更低的新型价值函数替代前向后向包络。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸非光滑项的扩展可能需要理论重构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 简化算法组件常能在保持收敛性的同时提升实际计算效率。

en.tldr: PANOC-lite is a novel linesearch algorithm for composite minimization that accelerates proximal-gradient iterations with Newton-type directions, featuring simpler computations and an enlarged stepsize range.
en.motivation: Existing composite minimization algorithms (e.g., PANOC and ZeroFPR) require additional gradient evaluations or expensive merit functions, limiting efficiency.
en.method: Proposes a linesearch method based on the standard proximal-gradient oracle, with a cheaper backtracking procedure (no extra gradients) and an enlarged permitted stepsize range.
en.result: Establishes global subsequential convergence and local superlinear convergence under conventional assumptions, validated on model predictive control problems and LIBSVM/CUTEst benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simpler and more efficient solver for composite optimization with convex nonsmooth terms, suitable for real-time control and large-scale benchmark problems.

idea_spark.idea: Design a novel merit function with lower evaluation cost than alternatives like the forward-backward envelope.
idea_spark.risk: Extension to nonconvex nonsmooth terms may require theoretical reformulation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simplifying algorithmic components often improves practical computational efficiency while preserving convergence guarantees.

papers.title: The free energy of the interacting Bose gas: a variational description with loops and interlacements
papers.summary: We consider the interacting Bose gas in the thermodynamic limit in a large box in $\R^d$ at positive temperature $1/β\in(0,\infty)$ with particle density $\simρ\in(0,\infty)$. We follow a path-integral approach and adopt from \cite {ACK10} a description of the free energy in terms of the {\it Brownian loop soup}, a Poisson point process consisting of Brownian bridges, also called loops or cycles. It is the objective of this paper to derive, for any values of $β$ and $ρ$, a formula for the limiting free energy with explicit control on the particle numbers in the short and in the long loops. The latter are presumed to play the role of the condensate, according to Feynman's \cite{F53} famous, vague suggestion, and they turn into {\it random interlacements} (bi-infinite, locally finite random processes in $\R^d$) in our formula. In \cite{ACK10} there was no concept that could describe the long loops; only small $ρ$ could be handled successfully.   In the present paper we represent the limiting free energy in terms of a variational formula, ranging over the set of all stationary point processes with loops and with interlacements, having each a given particle density, and minimizing the sum of the interaction energy and a characteristic entropy term. The latter is a new kind of a {\it specific relative entropy density} with respect to the reference process of loops (the Brownian loop soup), together with an independent Markov kernel describing collections of path shreds in large boxes. In $d\geq 3$, the latter can be seen as a projection of the {\em Brownian interlacement Poisson point process with $β$-spacing}. Our proof tool box comes from large-deviation theory, both for the derivation of the formula for the free energy and for the proof of the existence of the specific relative entropy.

ai.tldr: 本文通过变分公式描述了相互作用玻色气体在热力学极限下的自由能，将长循环视为随机交织，并引入了新的比相对熵密度。
ai.motivation: 先前工作（ACK10）缺乏描述长循环的概念，只能处理低密度情况。本文旨在对任意温度和密度，推导出自由能的极限表达式，并明确控制短循环和长循环中的粒子数。
ai.method: 采用路径积分方法，基于布朗循环汤描述自由能。利用大偏差理论，推导出自由能的变分公式，该公式遍历所有具有给定粒子密度的平稳点过程（包含循环和交织）。
ai.result: 得到了一个变分公式来表示极限自由能，该公式最小化相互作用能与一个新的比相对熵密度项之和。在d≥3维中，长循环相关的部分可视为具有β间距的布朗交织泊松点过程的投影。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解玻色气体凝聚现象提供了一个基于随机过程（循环和交织）的严格数学框架和变分描述。

idea_spark.idea: 用随机交织（双无限随机过程）来数学表征Feynman猜想中与凝聚相关的长循环行为。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架高度抽象，依赖于特定的随机过程构造，物理直观性可能较弱，且具体计算变分公式的解可能非常困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将其他量子多体系统的相变或有序现象与特定随机几何对象（如不同维度的交织、网络）联系起来进行研究。

en.tldr: This paper describes the free energy of the interacting Bose gas via a variational formula, treating long loops as random interlacements and introducing a new specific relative entropy density.
en.motivation: Previous work (ACK10) lacked a concept to describe long loops and could only handle low densities. This paper aims to derive, for any temperature and density, a formula for the limiting free energy with explicit control over particle numbers in short and long loops.
en.method: A path-integral approach is adopted, describing the free energy in terms of the Brownian loop soup. Using large-deviation theory, a variational formula for the free energy is derived, ranging over all stationary point processes with loops and interlacements having a given particle density.
en.result: A variational formula representing the limiting free energy is obtained, minimizing the sum of the interaction energy and a new specific relative entropy density term. In d≥3, the part related to long loops can be seen as a projection of the Brownian interlacement Poisson point process with β-spacing.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework based on stochastic processes (loops and interlacements) and a variational description for understanding Bose-Einstein condensation.

idea_spark.idea: Using random interlacements (bi-infinite, locally finite random processes) to mathematically characterize the long-loop behavior associated with condensation, as suggested by Feynman.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical framework is highly abstract, relying on specific stochastic process constructions, which may weaken physical intuition. Solving the variational formula explicitly may be very difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires linking phase transitions or ordering phenomena in other quantum many-body systems to specific random geometric objects (e.g., interlacements of different dimensions, networks).

papers.title: Gradient estimates for the Green kernel under spectral Ricci bounds, and the stable Bernstein theorem in $\mathbb{R}^4$
papers.summary: We describe a method to prove new integral inequalities for stable minimal hypersurfaces in Euclidean space. As an application, we give a simple proof that complete, two sided, stable minimal hypersurfaces in $\mathbb{R}^4$ are hyperplanes. A core part of the argument hinges on the fact that stable minimal hypersurfaces in non-negatively curved spaces are examples of manifolds with a spectral Ricci curvature lower bound; in particular, we prove a sharp pointwise gradient estimate for the Green kernel on non-parabolic manifolds with spectral Ricci lower bounds, extending previous work by Colding.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种证明欧氏空间中稳定极小超曲面新积分不等式的方法，并以此简洁证明了R^4中完备、双侧、稳定极小超曲面必为超平面。核心论证依赖于具有谱Ricci下界的流形上Green核的梯度估计。
ai.motivation: 研究稳定极小超曲面的几何与拓扑性质，特别是Bernstein型刚性定理在高维欧氏空间中的成立条件。
ai.method: 将稳定极小超曲面视为具有谱Ricci曲率下界的流形，建立非抛物流形上Green核的尖锐点态梯度估计，并由此推导积分不等式。
ai.result: 证明了R^4中完备双侧稳定极小超曲面必为超平面，推广了Colding先前的工作。
ai.help_to_user: 为几何分析中曲率条件与刚性现象的研究提供了新工具与简洁证明。

idea_spark.idea: 将稳定极小曲面的分析问题转化为谱曲率框架下的Green核估计问题。
idea_spark.risk: 方法高度依赖几何与分析的精密估计，推广至更一般曲率条件或更高维情形可能存在技术障碍。
idea_spark.inspiration: 曲率、谱理论与几何刚性之间的深刻联系，为几何偏微分方程提供统一视角。

zh.tldr: 本文提出了一种证明欧氏空间中稳定极小超曲面新积分不等式的方法，并以此简洁证明了R^4中完备、双侧、稳定极小超曲面必为超平面。核心论证依赖于具有谱Ricci下界的流形上Green核的梯度估计。

en.tldr: This paper introduces a method to prove new integral inequalities for stable minimal hypersurfaces in Euclidean space, providing a simple proof that complete, two-sided, stable minimal hypersurfaces in R^4 are hyperplanes. The core argument relies on sharp pointwise gradient estimates for the Green kernel on manifolds with spectral Ricci lower bounds.
en.motivation: To investigate the geometric and topological properties of stable minimal hypersurfaces, particularly the validity of Bernstein-type rigidity theorems in higher-dimensional Euclidean spaces.
en.method: Treat stable minimal hypersurfaces as manifolds with a spectral Ricci curvature lower bound, establish sharp pointwise gradient estimates for the Green kernel on non-parabolic manifolds, and derive integral inequalities.
en.result: Proves that complete two-sided stable minimal hypersurfaces in R^4 must be hyperplanes, extending previous work by Colding.
en.help_to_user: Provides new tools and a concise proof for studying curvature conditions and rigidity phenomena in geometric analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Transform the analysis of stable minimal surfaces into a Green kernel estimation problem within the spectral curvature framework.
idea_spark.risk: The method heavily relies on delicate geometric and analytic estimates; generalization to more general curvature conditions or higher dimensions may face technical hurdles.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deep connections between curvature, spectral theory, and geometric rigidity offer a unified perspective for geometric partial differential equations.

papers.title: Chaotic CNN for Limited Data Image Classification
papers.summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) often exhibit poor generalisation in limited training data scenarios due to overfitting and insufficient feature diversity. In this work, a simple and effective chaos-based feature transformation is proposed to enhance CNN performance without increasing model complexity. The method applies nonlinear transformations using logistic, skew tent, and sine maps to normalised feature vectors before the classification layer, thereby reshaping the feature space and improving class separability. The approach is evaluated on greyscale datasets (MNIST and Fashion-MNIST) and an RGB dataset (CIFAR-10) using CNN architectures of varying depth under limited data conditions. The results show consistent improvement over the standalone (SA) CNN across all datasets. Notably, a maximum performance gain of 5.43% is achieved on MNIST using the skew tent map with a 3-layer CNN at 40 samples per class. A higher gain of 9.11% is observed on Fashion-MNIST using the sine map with a 3-layer CNN at 50 samples per class. Additionally, a strong gain of 7.47% is obtained on CIFAR-10 using the skew tent map at 200 samples per class. The consistent improvements across different chaotic maps indicate that the performance gain is driven by the shared nonlinear and dynamical properties of chaotic systems. The proposed method is computationally efficient, requires no additional trainable parameters, and can be easily integrated into existing CNN architectures, making it a practical solution for data-scarce image classification tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于混沌映射的特征变换方法，在有限训练数据下提升CNN分类性能，无需增加模型参数。
ai.motivation: CNN在训练数据有限时容易过拟合且特征多样性不足，导致泛化能力下降。
ai.method: 在分类层前对归一化特征向量应用逻辑映射、斜帐篷映射和正弦映射等非线性混沌变换，重塑特征空间以增强类间可分性。
ai.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，使用不同深度CNN在有限数据条件下均取得稳定提升，最高在Fashion-MNIST上获得9.11%的性能增益。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种计算高效、无需额外可训练参数的实用方案，可轻松集成到现有CNN中，适用于数据稀缺的图像分类任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用混沌系统的固有随机性与确定性，在特征空间引入可控的多样性，模拟更多训练样本的效果。
idea_spark.risk: 混沌映射参数需要谨慎选择，不当设置可能导致特征破坏或收敛不稳定；在不同数据集和架构上需重新调优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从动力系统理论中借用混沌概念，为缓解过拟合提供了不同于传统正则化或数据增强的新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes a chaos-based feature transformation method to enhance CNN classification performance under limited training data without adding model parameters.
en.motivation: CNNs often suffer from overfitting and insufficient feature diversity in data-scarce scenarios, leading to poor generalization.
en.method: Applies nonlinear chaotic transformations (logistic, skew tent, and sine maps) to normalized feature vectors before the classification layer, reshaping the feature space to improve class separability.
en.result: Consistent improvements across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10 with varying CNN depths under limited data conditions, achieving up to 9.11% gain on Fashion-MNIST.
en.help_to_user: Offers a computationally efficient, parameter-free solution that can be easily integrated into existing CNNs for data-scarce image classification tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the inherent stochasticity and determinism of chaotic systems to introduce controlled diversity in the feature space, mimicking the effect of more training samples.
idea_spark.risk: Chaotic map parameters require careful selection; improper settings may corrupt features or destabilize convergence. Tuning is needed across different datasets and architectures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing chaos concepts from dynamical systems theory offers a novel perspective on overfitting mitigation, distinct from traditional regularization or data augmentation.

papers.title: Hamiltonian Monodromy in a Tavis-Cummings System with an $A_2$ Singularity
papers.summary: Singular Lagrangian fibrations arising from three-degree-of-freedom integrable Hamiltonian systems remain largely unexplored. While several results describe the global structure of large classes of systems with two degrees of freedom, only a few examples are understood in higher dimensions. We present a three-degree-of-freedom system derived from the two-spin Tavis-Cummings model whose singular Lagrangian fibration exhibits a topology that has not been observed in other physical models. We show that the most degenerate singular fiber is homeomorphic to $\mathbf{S}^2\times\mathbf{S}^1$ with a singularity of $A_2$ type. We further describe the bifurcation diagram and the global topology of the fibration, and we compute its Hamiltonian monodromy.

ai.tldr: 研究三自由度可积哈密顿系统的奇异拉格朗日纤维化，以两自旋Tavis-Cummings模型为例，发现其具有A_2型奇点的奇异纤维拓扑结构，并计算了哈密顿单值性。
ai.motivation: 三自由度可积哈密顿系统的奇异拉格朗日纤维化全局结构研究较少，缺乏物理模型实例。
ai.method: 从两自旋Tavis-Cummings模型推导三自由度系统，分析其奇异拉格朗日纤维化的拓扑结构、分岔图，并计算哈密顿单值性。
ai.result: 发现最退化奇异纤维同胚于S^2×S^1，具有A_2型奇点，描述了纤维化的整体拓扑并计算了单值性。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维可积系统的拓扑研究提供了具体物理模型和新的奇异纤维拓扑实例。

idea_spark.idea: 在其他多自旋或耦合腔量子系统中寻找类似的高维奇异拓扑结构
idea_spark.risk: 高维系统分析复杂，实验实现困难
idea_spark.inspiration: 量子光学模型可作为探索高维可积系统拓扑的丰富来源

en.tldr: Studies singular Lagrangian fibrations in a three-degree-of-freedom integrable Hamiltonian system derived from the two-spin Tavis-Cummings model, revealing an A_2-type singular fiber topology and computing Hamiltonian monodromy.
en.motivation: The global structure of singular Lagrangian fibrations for three-degree-of-freedom integrable Hamiltonian systems remains largely unexplored with few physical examples.
en.method: Derives a three-degree-of-freedom system from the two-spin Tavis-Cummings model, analyzes the topology of its singular Lagrangian fibration, bifurcation diagram, and computes Hamiltonian monodromy.
en.result: Shows the most degenerate singular fiber is homeomorphic to S^2×S^1 with an A_2-type singularity, describes the global topology of the fibration, and computes its monodromy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a concrete physical model and novel singular fiber topology for studying higher-dimensional integrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: Search for similar high-dimensional singular topological structures in other multi-spin or coupled-cavity quantum systems
idea_spark.risk: High-dimensional system analysis is complex, experimental realization challenging
idea_spark.inspiration: Quantum optics models serve as rich sources for exploring topology in high-dimensional integrable systems

papers.title: Nonlinear Schrödinger equations with spatial white noise potential on full space for $d\le 3$
papers.summary: In this paper, we prove existence and uniqueness of energy solutions for nonlinear Schrödinger equations with a multiplicative white noise on $R^d$ with $d\le3$. We rely on an exponential trans-form and conserved quantities for existence of energy solutions. Using paracontrolled calculus, we prove Strichartz inequalities which encode the dispersive properties of the solutions. This allows to obtain local well-posedness for low regularity solutions and uniqueness of energy solutions for various equations. In particular, our results are the first results of propagation without loss of both regularity and localization for such equations in full space as well as the first results on $R^3$ for such singular dispersive SPDEs. We are also obtain local well-posedness in two dimensions for deterministic initial data.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在d≤3的全空间上，带乘性白噪声的非线性薛定谔方程能量解的存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 研究全空间中带奇异白噪声势的非线性薛定谔方程，此前缺乏关于正则性和局部性同时保持的传播结果，尤其在三维情形。
ai.method: 采用指数变换和守恒量证明能量解存在性；利用抛物控制微积分证明Strichartz不等式以捕捉解的色散性质。
ai.result: 获得了低正则性解的局部适定性、能量解的唯一性，首次实现了全空间中此类方程正则性和局部性的无损失传播，也是三维情形此类奇异色散随机偏微分方程的首个结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带白噪声的奇异色散SPDE提供了存在性、唯一性和适定性分析的完整框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将确定性色散方程的Strichartz估计推广至带乘性空间白噪声的情形，通过抛物结构控制奇异性。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形(d>3)可能因噪声奇异性增强而方法失效，需要发展新的正则化技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可尝试推广至其他带随机势的色散方程（如波动方程、KdV方程），或考虑时间依赖的白噪声。

en.tldr: This paper proves existence and uniqueness of energy solutions for nonlinear Schrödinger equations with multiplicative white noise on full space for dimensions d ≤ 3.
en.motivation: To study nonlinear Schrödinger equations with singular white noise potential in full space, where previous results lacked propagation without loss of both regularity and localization, especially in three dimensions.
en.method: Use exponential transform and conserved quantities for existence of energy solutions; employ paracontrolled calculus to prove Strichartz inequalities encoding dispersive properties.
en.result: Obtain local well-posedness for low regularity solutions and uniqueness of energy solutions, achieving the first results of propagation without loss of regularity and localization in full space, and the first results on R^3 for such singular dispersive SPDEs.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete framework for existence, uniqueness, and well-posedness analysis of singular dispersive SPDEs with white noise.

idea_spark.idea: Extend Strichartz estimates from deterministic dispersive equations to the case with multiplicative spatial white noise, controlling singularities via paracontrolled structure.
idea_spark.risk: Methods may fail in higher dimensions (d>3) due to increased noise singularity, requiring new regularization techniques.
idea_spark.inspiration: The framework could be extended to other dispersive equations with random potentials (e.g., wave, KdV equations) or consider time-dependent white noise.

papers.title: Gradient estimates for a parabolic partial differential equation under the Ricci-Bourguignon flow
papers.summary: We study the Ricci-Bourguignon flow on warped product manifolds with noncompact base. This setting leads naturally to a parabolic partial differential equation on the space of smooth warping functions, arising from the necessary and sufficient conditions for a warped metric to evolve under the flow. One of our main results establishes a gradient estimate for this equation, providing the analytic input for the geometric applications developed herein and, in particular, recovering classical gradient estimates for the heat equation under the Ricci flow. Furthermore, we show how to construct explicit warped solutions to the Ricci-Bourguignon flow and present examples that are not only of independent interest but also illustrate and support our results

ai.tldr: 研究非紧基上扭曲积流形在Ricci-Bourguignon流下的演化，建立扭曲函数空间上抛物型偏微分方程的梯度估计，并构造显式解。
ai.motivation: 扭曲度量在Ricci-Bourguignon流下演化的充要条件自然导出一个抛物型偏微分方程，需要对其进行分析以支持几何应用。
ai.method: 在非紧基的扭曲积流形上，从Ricci-Bourguignon流的演化条件推导出扭曲函数的抛物方程，并建立该方程的梯度估计。
ai.result: 获得了该抛物方程的梯度估计，为几何应用提供了分析工具，恢复了Ricci流下热方程的经典梯度估计，并构造了显式的扭曲解实例。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了Ricci-Bourguignon流在扭曲积结构下分析的新工具和显式解例，有助于理解此类几何流的局部行为与解的构造。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何流的演化条件转化为扭曲函数空间的分析问题，通过梯度估计控制解的行为。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于特定的流形结构与流方程，向更一般流形或流的推广可能需要额外条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 此方法可能适用于其他几何流（如Yamabe流）在乘积结构或纤维丛上的分析。

idea_spark.inspiration: 此方法可能适用于其他几何流（如Yamabe流）在乘积结构或纤维丛上的分析。

en.tldr: Studies the Ricci-Bourguignon flow on warped product manifolds with noncompact base, establishes a gradient estimate for the resulting parabolic PDE on warping functions, and constructs explicit solutions.
en.motivation: The necessary and sufficient conditions for a warped metric to evolve under the Ricci-Bourguignon flow naturally lead to a parabolic PDE on the space of smooth warping functions, requiring analysis for geometric applications.
en.method: On warped product manifolds with noncompact base, derive a parabolic equation for the warping function from the evolution conditions of the Ricci-Bourguignon flow and establish a gradient estimate for this equation.
en.result: Obtains a gradient estimate for the parabolic equation, providing analytic input for geometric applications, recovering classical gradient estimates for the heat equation under Ricci flow, and constructs explicit examples of warped solutions.
en.help_to_user: Provides new analytic tools and explicit solution examples for the Ricci-Bourguignon flow on warped product structures, aiding in understanding local behavior and solution construction for such geometric flows.

idea_spark.idea: Transform evolution conditions of a geometric flow into an analytic problem on the space of warping functions and control solution behavior via gradient estimates.
idea_spark.risk: Conclusions depend on specific manifold structures and flow equations; generalization to more general manifolds or flows may require additional conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach may be applicable to analyzing other geometric flows (e.g., Yamabe flow) on product structures or fiber bundles.

papers.title: Class Unlearning via Depth-Aware Removal of Forget-Specific Directions
papers.summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove targeted knowledge from a trained model without the cost of retraining from scratch. In class unlearning, however, reducing accuracy on forget classes does not necessarily imply true forgetting: forgotten information can remain encoded in internal representations, and apparent forgetting may arise from classifier-head suppression rather than representational removal. We show that existing class-unlearning methods often exhibit weak or negative selectivity, preserve forget-class structure in deep representations, or rely heavily on final-layer bias shifts. We then introduce DAMP (Depth-Aware Modulation by Projection), a one-shot, closed-form weight-surgery method that removes forget-specific directions from a pretrained network without gradient-based optimization. At each stage, DAMP computes class prototypes in the input space of the next learnable operator, extracts forget directions as residuals relative to retain-class prototypes, and applies a projection-based update to reduce downstream sensitivity to those directions. To preserve utility, DAMP uses a parameter-free depth-aware scaling rule derived from probe separability, applying smaller edits in early layers and larger edits in deeper layers. The method naturally extends to multi-class forgetting through low-rank subspace removal. Across MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny ImageNet, and across convolutional and transformer architectures, DAMP more closely resembles the retraining gold standard than some of the prior methods, improving selective forgetting while better preserving retain-class performance and reducing residual forget-class structure in deep layers.

ai.tldr: 提出DAMP方法，通过深度感知的投影手术一次性移除预训练网络中的遗忘类特定方向，实现更接近重训练效果的类别遗忘。
ai.motivation: 现有类别遗忘方法常导致弱选择性、深层表示中保留遗忘类结构，或过度依赖分类头偏置偏移，而非真正移除表示信息。
ai.method: DAMP在每层计算下一可学习算子的输入空间类原型，提取遗忘方向作为相对于保留类原型的残差，应用投影更新减少下游对这些方向的敏感性，并使用基于探针可分离性的深度感知缩放规则。
ai.result: 在多个数据集和架构上，DAMP比现有方法更接近重训练基准，改善了选择性遗忘，同时更好地保留了保留类性能并减少了深层中的残留遗忘类结构。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需梯度优化、闭式权重手术的类别遗忘方法，适用于需要从模型中移除特定类别知识且希望保持模型整体效用的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 在模型不同深度应用差异化编辑强度，早期层小编辑保护基础特征，深层大编辑实现有效遗忘。
idea_spark.risk: 闭式方法可能对模型架构和任务假设敏感，在极端复杂或非线性层中效果可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将遗忘问题转化为方向移除问题，并通过原型残差量化遗忘特异性，为理解神经网络中的知识编码提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes DAMP, a depth-aware projection surgery method that removes forget-specific directions from pretrained networks in one shot, achieving class unlearning closer to retraining.
en.motivation: Existing class-unlearning methods often exhibit weak selectivity, preserve forget-class structure in deep representations, or rely heavily on classifier-head bias shifts rather than true representational removal.
en.method: DAMP computes class prototypes in each layer's input space, extracts forget directions as residuals relative to retain-class prototypes, applies projection-based updates to reduce downstream sensitivity, and uses a depth-aware scaling rule derived from probe separability.
en.result: Across multiple datasets and architectures, DAMP more closely resembles retraining baselines than prior methods, improving selective forgetting while better preserving retain-class performance and reducing residual forget-class structure in deep layers.
en.help_to_user: Provides a gradient-free, closed-form weight surgery approach for class unlearning, suitable for scenarios requiring removal of specific class knowledge while maintaining model utility.

idea_spark.idea: Apply differential editing strengths across model depths—smaller edits in early layers to protect basic features, larger edits in deeper layers for effective forgetting.
idea_spark.risk: Closed-form methods may be sensitive to model architecture and task assumptions, potentially limited in highly complex or nonlinear layers.
idea_spark.inspiration: Framing forgetting as direction removal and quantifying forget-specificity via prototype residuals offers new perspectives on knowledge encoding in neural networks.

papers.title: Lightweight Real-Time ALADIN for Distributed Optimization
papers.summary: This paper presents a real-time computational framework for multi-node distributed optimization by extending the Augmented Lagrangian Alternating Direction Inexact Newton (ALADIN) algorithm. Our approach integrates adjoint sequential quadratic programming (SQP) techniques to enable efficient approximation of Jacobian information within the ALADIN embedded quadratic program, thereby reducing communication overhead. Furthermore, to decrease computational complexity, we design an event-triggered update strategy that avoids updating Hessian and Jacobian matrices at every iteration. The proposed method achieves local convergence and enhanced communication efficiency, making it well suited for time-critical applications. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance while exhibiting superior computational efficiency in real-time scenarios, validating its practical applicability for time-sensitive distributed optimization challenges.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级实时ALADIN框架，通过结合伴随SQP技术和事件触发更新策略，实现了分布式优化的高效实时计算。
ai.motivation: 传统分布式优化算法在时间敏感场景中面临通信开销大和计算复杂度高的问题，需要一种更高效的实时计算方法。
ai.method: 扩展ALADIN算法，集成伴随SQP技术近似雅可比信息，设计事件触发更新策略减少Hessian和Jacobian矩阵的频繁更新。
ai.result: 方法实现了局部收敛和更高的通信效率，数值实验表明在实时场景中具有竞争性性能和优越的计算效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为时间敏感的分布式优化问题提供了一种轻量级实时计算解决方案，特别适合需要快速响应的应用场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将伴随SQP技术与分布式优化框架结合，实现雅可比信息的高效近似
idea_spark.risk: 局部收敛性质可能限制其在非凸问题中的全局性能
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将实时计算思想与经典优化算法融合，平衡精度与效率

en.tldr: This paper presents a lightweight real-time ALADIN framework that integrates adjoint SQP techniques and event-triggered update strategies for efficient distributed optimization in time-sensitive scenarios.
en.motivation: Traditional distributed optimization algorithms suffer from high communication overhead and computational complexity in time-critical applications, necessitating more efficient real-time computation methods.
en.method: Extends the ALADIN algorithm by incorporating adjoint SQP for Jacobian approximation and designs an event-triggered update strategy to reduce frequent Hessian and Jacobian matrix updates.
en.result: The approach achieves local convergence and enhanced communication efficiency, with numerical experiments demonstrating competitive performance and superior computational efficiency in real-time scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight real-time computational solution for time-sensitive distributed optimization problems, particularly suitable for applications requiring fast response.

idea_spark.idea: Combining adjoint SQP techniques with distributed optimization frameworks enables efficient approximation of Jacobian information
idea_spark.risk: Local convergence properties may limit global performance in non-convex problems
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the fusion of real-time computation concepts with classical optimization algorithms to balance accuracy and efficiency

papers.title: Landau damping on expanding backgrounds
papers.summary: We analyse the effect of expansion in Newtonian cosmology on the asymptotic behaviour of charged self-interacting plasmas close to Poisson equilibria. To this end, we study the Vlasov-Poisson system on the phase space of a $3$-torus which is expanding with respect to the scale factor $a(t)$. We show that, for $a(t)=t^q$ with $q\in(0,\frac12)$, solutions to this system exhibit nonlinear Landau damping for initial data that is small with respect to a suitably strong Gevrey class, i.e., the charge density contrast of the plasma decays superpolynomially. For larger choices of $q$ within this range, the initial data requirements become stricter while the decay weakens. To our knowledge, this is the first result showing Landau damping in a cosmological setting.

ai.tldr: 研究牛顿宇宙学中膨胀背景对带电自相互作用等离子体接近泊松平衡态时渐近行为的影响，证明在特定膨胀率下，小初值解会呈现非线性朗道阻尼。
ai.motivation: 探索宇宙膨胀如何影响等离子体的长期动力学行为，特别是朗道阻尼现象在宇宙学背景下的表现。
ai.method: 在膨胀的三维环面相空间中研究Vlasov-Poisson系统，采用强Gevrey类小初值，分析尺度因子a(t)=t^q（q∈(0,1/2)）时的渐近行为。
ai.result: 当q∈(0,1/2)时，系统解呈现非线性朗道阻尼，等离子体电荷密度对比度超多项式衰减；q越大，初值要求越严格，衰减越弱。
ai.help_to_user: 首次在宇宙学背景下证明朗道阻尼存在，为膨胀宇宙中等离子体行为提供数学理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 研究其他宇宙学模型（如相对论性膨胀）中的类似阻尼现象
idea_spark.risk: 强Gevrey类初值条件可能限制物理适用性
idea_spark.inspiration: 膨胀背景可能产生新的稳定机制或衰减模式

idea_spark.inspiration: 膨胀背景可能产生新的稳定机制或衰减模式

en.tldr: Analyzes the effect of expansion in Newtonian cosmology on charged plasmas near Poisson equilibrium, proving nonlinear Landau damping occurs for small initial data under specific expansion rates.
en.motivation: To understand how cosmological expansion affects long-term plasma dynamics, particularly Landau damping in an expanding universe.
en.method: Studies the Vlasov-Poisson system on an expanding 3-torus phase space with scale factor a(t)=t^q (q∈(0,1/2)), using small initial data in a strong Gevrey class.
en.result: For q∈(0,1/2), solutions exhibit nonlinear Landau damping with superpolynomial decay of charge density contrast; larger q requires stricter initial conditions and yields weaker decay.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first proof of Landau damping in a cosmological setting, establishing mathematical foundations for plasma behavior in expanding universes.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate similar damping phenomena in other cosmological models (e.g., relativistic expansion)
idea_spark.risk: Strong Gevrey-class initial conditions may limit physical applicability
idea_spark.inspiration: Expanding backgrounds may introduce novel stabilization mechanisms or decay patterns

papers.title: Interpretable Human Activity Recognition for Subtle Robbery Detection in Surveillance Videos
papers.summary: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically because they are brief, subtle, and often indistinguishable from benign human interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage. This paper presents a hybrid, pose-driven approach for detecting snatch-and-run events that combines real-time perception with an interpretable classification stage suitable for edge deployment. The system uses a YOLO-based pose estimator to extract body keypoints for each tracked person and computes kinematic and interaction features describing hand speed, arm extension, proximity, and relative motion between an aggressor-victim pair. A Random Forest classifier is trained on these descriptors, and a temporal hysteresis filter is applied to stabilize frame-level predictions and reduce spurious alarms. We evaluate the method on a staged dataset and on a disjoint test set collected from internet videos, demonstrating promising generalization across different scenes and camera viewpoints. Finally, we implement the complete pipeline on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano and report real-time performance, supporting the feasibility of proactive, on-device robbery detection.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于姿态的混合方法，用于在监控视频中检测非暴力抢夺事件。该方法结合实时感知与可解释分类，适合边缘设备部署。
ai.motivation: 非暴力街头抢夺（抢了就跑）因其短暂、细微且与良性互动难以区分，在无约束监控视频中难以自动检测。
ai.method: 系统使用基于YOLO的姿态估计器提取人体关键点，计算手部速度、手臂伸展、接近度和攻击者-受害者相对运动等运动学与交互特征，并用随机森林分类器进行训练，最后使用时序滞后滤波器稳定预测。
ai.result: 在模拟数据集和互联网视频测试集上评估，展示了跨场景和视角的良好泛化能力，并在NVIDIA Jetson Nano上实现了实时性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为监控视频中的细微抢夺行为检测提供了一种可解释、可边缘部署的解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将实时姿态估计与可解释的机器学习分类器结合，用于边缘设备的实时异常检测。
idea_spark.risk: 在更复杂、拥挤或遮挡严重的真实场景中，姿态估计的准确性和特征的有效性可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将高级行为理解任务分解为姿态估计、特征工程和轻量级分类的流水线，以平衡性能与可部署性。

en.motivation: Non-violent street robberies (snatch-and-run) are difficult to detect automatically due to their brief, subtle nature and similarity to benign interactions in unconstrained surveillance footage.

idea_spark.idea: Combine real-time pose estimation with an interpretable machine learning classifier for real-time anomaly detection on edge devices.
idea_spark.risk: Pose estimation accuracy and feature effectiveness may degrade in more complex, crowded, or heavily occluded real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires decomposing high-level activity understanding into pipelines of pose estimation, feature engineering, and lightweight classification to balance performance and deployability.

papers.title: Well-Posedness of Generalized Mean-Reflected McKean-Vlasov Backward Stochastic Differential Equations
papers.summary: This paper investigates a class of generalized mean-reflected McKean-Vlasov type backward stochastic differential equations (BSDEs). Our new framework combines a mean reflection constraint on the solution's expectation with a generalized integral with respect to a continuous non-decreasing process. We establish the existence and uniqueness of the solution. The uniqueness is derived via stability estimates, while the existence is proved by employing a penalization method combined with a smooth approximation of the obstacle.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类广义平均反射McKean-Vlasov型倒向随机微分方程，结合了期望的平均反射约束和关于连续非降过程的广义积分，证明了解的存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 将平均反射约束与广义积分结构结合，扩展McKean-Vlasov型倒向随机微分方程的理论框架。
ai.method: 通过稳定性估计证明唯一性；采用惩罚化方法结合障碍的光滑逼近证明存在性。
ai.result: 建立了该类方程解的存在唯一性定理。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有平均反射约束和广义积分结构的McKean-Vlasov系统提供了严格的存在唯一性理论。

idea_spark.idea: 将平均反射约束与更一般的积分过程结合，可推广到带跳过程或分数布朗运动驱动的系统。
idea_spark.risk: 广义积分的具体形式可能限制应用范围，需验证实际模型的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可能用于具有期望约束的金融定价或平均场博弈问题。
